SELECT
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.ecosystimephasedbudgetid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectnumber,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectperiod,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.workflowinstanceid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.budgetheaderid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.changeheaderid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.costaccountfield,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.pathid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.minorperiod,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.jacobscost,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.clientcost,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.jacobshours,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.clienthours,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.currency,
	concat(projectnumber,'~', projectperiod, '~',minorPeriod , '~',EcoSysTimephasedBudgetId ),
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.gidquantity,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget..GDCName
FROM
    bi_timephaseddata_budget
where  workflowinstanceid in (
select distinct workflowinstanceid
from BI_TimephasedData_Queue)

SELECT
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.ecosystimephasedbudgetid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectnumber,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectperiod,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.workflowinstanceid+1000000 as workflowinstanceid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.budgetheaderid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.changeheaderid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.costaccountfield,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.pathid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.minorperiod,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.jacobscost,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.clientcost,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.jacobshours,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.clienthours,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.currency,
	concat(bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectnumber,'~', bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectperiod, '~',bi_timephaseddata_budget.minorPeriod , '~',bi_timephaseddata_budget.EcoSysTimephasedBudgetId ),
	bi_timephaseddata_budget.gidquantity,
	bi_timephaseddata_budget.GDCName,
	bi_timephaseddata_budget.GIDCBDirectCost,
	bi_timephaseddata_budget.GIDCBAtBillRevenue,
	bi_timephaseddata_budget.GIDBillableHours
FROM
    bi_timephaseddata_budget
--where  workflowinstanceid in ( 695,702)
--select workflowinstanceid
--from BI_TimephasedData_Queue where enddate>=convert(datetime,'$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE',121))
inner join
	(select distinct projectnumber, workflowinstanceid
from BI_TimephasedData_Queue
where  editeddate > convert(datetime,'$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE',121) --'10/13/2020'
and workflowinstanceid is not null) new_data
on bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectnumber = new_data.projectnumber
and bi_timephaseddata_budget.workflowinstanceid = new_data.workflowinstanceid
and bi_timephaseddata_budget.workflowinstanceid is not null and bi_timephaseddata_budget.workflowinstanceid > 0

Select scenario, year, period, Entity legal_entity, PU performance_unit, currency, account, 'No Project' project, 'Proforma_View' audittrail, amount

from WC_PBCS_EXEC_PLAN_P_FS

UNION ALL

Select scenario, year, period, Entity legal_entity, PU performance_unit, currency, account, 'No Project' project, 'PF_Other View' audittrail, amount

from WC_PBCS_EXEC_PLAN_P_OTH_FS

Select scenario, year, period, Entity legal_entity, PU performance_unit, currency, account, 'No Project' project, 'Proforma_View' audittrail, amount

from WC_PBCS_EXEC_ACTUALS_P_FS

UNION ALL

Select scenario, year, period, Entity legal_entity, PU performance_unit, currency, account, 'No Project' project, 'PF_Other View' audittrail, amount

from WC_PBCS_EXEC_ACTUALS_P_OTH_FS

select scenario, year, period, Entity legal_entity, PU performance_unit, currency, account, 'No Project' project, 'Statutory_View' audittrail, amount from WC_PBCS_EXEC_ACTUALS_SM_FS

where audittrail like 'OPS_%' and audittrail not like 'OPS_LG%'

UNION ALL

select scenario, year, period, Entity legal_entity, PU performance_unit, currency, account, 'No Project' project, 'Management_View' audittrail, amount from WC_PBCS_EXEC_ACTUALS_SM_FS

where audittrail not like 'OPS_%' and audittrail not like '%DiscOps%' and audittrail not like 'MGMT_LG_LEDGER_AHFS'

select SCENARIO,concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,substr(PERFORMANCE_UNIT,4) PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,(case when substr(ACCOUNT,1,3) ='AC_' THEN substr(ACCOUNT,4) ELSE ACCOUNT END) ACCOUNT,AUDITTRAIL,to_number(substr(AMOUNT,1,(instr(AMOUNT, chr(13))-1))) as AMOUNT 
FROM wc_pbcs_actuals_MS_fs where AUDITTRAIL='Management_View'

UNION ALL

select SCENARIO, concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD, LEGAL_ENTITY ,substr(PERFORMANCE_UNIT,4) PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,(case when substr(ACCOUNT,1,3) ='AC_' THEN substr(ACCOUNT,4) ELSE ACCOUNT END) ACCOUNT,AUDITTRAIL,to_number(substr(AMOUNT,1,(instr(AMOUNT, chr(13))-1))) as AMOUNT 
FROM wc_pbcs_actuals_MS_fs where AUDITTRAIL='Statutory_View'

UNION ALL

select SCENARIO, PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,ACCOUNT,AUDITTRAIL, sum(AMOUNT) as AMOUNT 
FROM((select SCENARIO,concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,substr(PERFORMANCE_UNIT,4) PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,(case when substr(ACCOUNT,1,3) ='AC_' THEN substr(ACCOUNT,4) ELSE ACCOUNT END) ACCOUNT,'Proforma_View' as AUDITTRAIL,to_number(substr(AMOUNT,1,(instr(AMOUNT, chr(13))-1))) as AMOUNT 
FROM wc_pbcs_actuals_MS_fs where AUDITTRAIL='Management_View') 
UNION ALL 
(select SCENARIO,concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,substr(PERFORMANCE_UNIT,4) PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,(case when substr(ACCOUNT,1,3) ='AC_' THEN substr(ACCOUNT,4) ELSE ACCOUNT END) ACCOUNT,'Proforma_View' as AUDITTRAIL,to_number(substr(AMOUNT,1,(instr(AMOUNT, chr(13))-1))) as AMOUNT 
FROM wc_pbcs_actuals_p_fs )) 
group by SCENARIO,PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,ACCOUNT,AUDITTRAIL

UNION ALL 

select SCENARIO,concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,substr(PERFORMANCE_UNIT,4) PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,(case when substr(ACCOUNT,1,3) ='AC_' THEN substr(ACCOUNT,4) ELSE ACCOUNT END) ACCOUNT,AUDITTRAIL,to_number(substr(AMOUNT,1,(instr(AMOUNT, chr(13))-1))) as AMOUNT 
FROM wc_pbcs_plan_MS_fs where AUDITTRAIL='Management_View'

UNION ALL

select SCENARIO,concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,substr(PERFORMANCE_UNIT,4) PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,(case when substr(ACCOUNT,1,3) ='AC_' THEN substr(ACCOUNT,4) ELSE ACCOUNT END) ACCOUNT,AUDITTRAIL,to_number(substr(AMOUNT,1,(instr(AMOUNT, chr(13))-1))) as AMOUNT 
FROM wc_pbcs_plan_MS_fs where AUDITTRAIL='Statutory_View'

UNION ALL

select SCENARIO,PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,ACCOUNT,AUDITTRAIL, sum(AMOUNT) as AMOUNT 
FROM((select SCENARIO,concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,substr(PERFORMANCE_UNIT,4) PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,(case when substr(ACCOUNT,1,3) ='AC_' THEN substr(ACCOUNT,4) ELSE ACCOUNT END) ACCOUNT,'Proforma_View' as AUDITTRAIL,to_number(substr(AMOUNT,1,(instr(AMOUNT, chr(13))-1))) as AMOUNT 
FROM wc_pbcs_plan_MS_fs where AUDITTRAIL='Management_View') 
UNION ALL 
(select SCENARIO,concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,substr(PERFORMANCE_UNIT,4) PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,(case when substr(ACCOUNT,1,3) ='AC_' THEN substr(ACCOUNT,4) ELSE ACCOUNT END) ACCOUNT,'Proforma_View' as AUDITTRAIL,to_number(substr(AMOUNT,1,(instr(AMOUNT, chr(13))-1))) as AMOUNT 
FROM wc_pbcs_plan_p_fs )) 
group by SCENARIO,PERIOD,LEGAL_ENTITY ,PERFORMANCE_UNIT,CURRENCY,ACCOUNT,AUDITTRAIL

select * from WC_PBCS_ACTUALS_PS where PERIOD in (
select distinct PERIOD FROM(
select concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD  from wc_pbcs_actuals_MS_fs
UNION
select concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD from wc_pbcs_actuals_p_fs 
UNION
select concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD  from wc_pbcs_plan_MS_fs
UNION
select concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD  from wc_pbcs_plan_p_fs
)
)

UNION ALL

select * from WC_PBCS_PLAN_PS where PERIOD in (
select distinct PERIOD FROM(
select concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD  from wc_pbcs_actuals_MS_fs
UNION
select concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD from wc_pbcs_actuals_p_fs 
UNION
select concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD  from wc_pbcs_plan_MS_fs
UNION
select concat(concat(upper(period),'-FY20'),substr(YEAR,3)) PERIOD  from wc_pbcs_plan_p_fs
)
)

SELECT    FS.ecosys_timephased_budgetid,
    FS.project_number,
    FS.project_period,
    FS.workflow_instance_id,
    FS.budget_header_id,
    FS.change_header_id,
    FS.cost_account_field,
    FS.path_id,
    FS.minor_period,
    FS.jacobs_cost,
    FS.client_cost,
    FS.jacobs_hours,
    FS.client_hours,
    FS.currency,
    FS.aux1_changed_on_dt,
    FS.aux2_changed_on_dt,
    FS.aux3_changed_on_dt,
    FS.aux4_changed_on_dt,
    FS.datasource_num_id,
    FS.integration_id,
    FS.tenant_id,
	NVL(PROJ_D.ROW_WID,0),
NVL(MCAL_D.ROW_WID,0),
/*case when TO_number(substr(FS.MINOR_PERIOD,-2)) > 21 then 101220211001000 
when UPPER(FS.minor_period) in ('OCT-21','NOV-21','DEC-21') then 101220211001000 
else nvl(MINOR_MCAL_D.ROW_WID,0) end ,  */
NVL(MINOR_MCAL_D.ROW_WID,0),
NVL(ORG_DH.ROW_WID,0),
MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT,
NVL(BUD_WID.ROW_WID,0),
NVL(COBS.ROW_WID,0),
FS.GID_EAC_HOURS,
NVL(REPLACE(FS.GDCName, ' ', 'Undefined'), 'Undefined') GDCName,
FS.GID_CB_FUNC_DIRECTCOST,
FS.GID_CB_FUNC_ATBILLREVENUE
FROM
    wc_bi_timephasedata_budget_fs FS,
	W_PROJECT_D PROJ_D,
W_MCAL_PERIOD_D MCAL_D,
W_MCAL_PERIOD_D MINOR_MCAL_D,
WC_BU_ORG_DH ORG_DH,
(
select max(NVL(W_TASK_D.ROW_WID,0)) as ROW_WID ,COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER,COBS.PATH_ID ,COBS.PROJECT_PERIOD ,COBS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID 
FROM W_TASK_D,
WC_BI_TIMEPHASEDATA_COBS_D COBS,
W_PROJECT_D PROJ_D WHERE 
COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER = PROJ_D.PROJECT_NUMBER  
AND COBS.ORACLE_TASK_NUMBER = W_TASK_D.TASK_NUMBER
AND PROJ_D.INTEGRATION_ID = W_TASK_D.PROJECT_ID 
AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_TASK_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID 
AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID(+) = 13
group by COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER,COBS.PATH_ID ,COBS.PROJECT_PERIOD ,COBS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID)COBS,
(
select max(NVL(BUD_WID.ROW_WID,0)) as ROW_WID ,BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID ,BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER ,BUD_WID.TASK_ID
from WC_BI_TIMEPHASEDATA_BDG_HDR_D BUD_WID 
group by BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID ,BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER ,BUD_WID.TASK_ID)BUD_WID
--,WC_BI_COMPLIANCE_COMPLIANT_A COMP_AGG
WHERE 
FS.PROJECT_NUMBER  = PROJ_D.PROJECT_NUMBER (+) 
AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID(+) = 13
AND TO_CHAR(TO_date(concat(FS.PROJECT_PERIOD,'-01'),'YYYY-MM-DD'),'MON-YY')= TO_CHAR(MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT (+) -10,'MON-YY')
AND MCAL_D.MCAL_CAL_WID (+)  = 1012 AND UPPER(MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_TYPE (+) ) = 'MONTH'
AND TO_CHAR(TO_date(concat(FS.MINOR_PERIOD,'-01'),'YYYY-MM-DD'),'MON-YY')= TO_CHAR(MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT (+) -10,'MON-YY')  
AND MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_CAL_WID (+)  = 1012 AND UPPER(MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_TYPE (+) ) = 'MONTH'
AND PROJ_D.X_CONTROL_PU = ORG_DH.INTEGRATION_ID  (+)
AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = ORG_DH.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID (+)
AND (NVL(FS.CHANGE_HEADER_ID,FS.BUDGET_HEADER_ID) = (substr(BUD_WID.PROJECt_NUMBER(+),1,6)||'.'||BUD_WID.TASK_ID(+))  )
AND FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER  (+)
AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID  (+)
AND FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER (+) 
AND FS.PATH_ID = COBS.PATH_ID (+) 
AND FS.PROJECT_PERIOD = COBS.PROJECT_PERIOD (+) 
AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = COBS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID (+)
--AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = COMP_AGG.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID 
--AND FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = COMP_AGG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
--and FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = COMP_AGG.PROJECT_NUMBER

SELECT    FS.ecosys_timephased_budgetid,
    FS.project_number,
    FS.project_period,
    FS.workflow_instance_id,
    FS.budget_header_id,
    FS.change_header_id,
    FS.cost_account_field,
    FS.path_id,
    FS.minor_period,
    FS.jacobs_cost,
    FS.client_cost,
    FS.jacobs_hours,
    FS.client_hours,
    FS.currency,
    FS.aux1_changed_on_dt,
    FS.aux2_changed_on_dt,
    FS.aux3_changed_on_dt,
    FS.aux4_changed_on_dt,
    FS.datasource_num_id,
    FS.integration_id,
    FS.tenant_id,
	NVL(PROJ_D.ROW_WID,0),
NVL(MCAL_D.ROW_WID,0),
/*case when TO_number(substr(FS.MINOR_PERIOD,-2)) > 21 then 101220211001000 
when UPPER(FS.minor_period) in ('OCT-21','NOV-21','DEC-21') then 101220211001000 
else nvl(MINOR_MCAL_D.ROW_WID,0) end ,  */
NVL(MINOR_MCAL_D.ROW_WID,0),
NVL(ORG_DH.ROW_WID,0),
MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT,
NVL(BUD_WID.ROW_WID,0),
NVL(COBS.ROW_WID,0),
FS.GID_EAC_HOURS,
NVL(REPLACE(FS.GDCName, ' ', 'Undefined'), 'Undefined') GDCName,
FS.GID_CB_FUNC_DIRECTCOST,
FS.GID_CB_FUNC_ATBILLREVENUE,
FS.GID_Billable_Hours
FROM
    wc_bi_timephasedata_budget_fs FS,
	W_PROJECT_D PROJ_D,
W_MCAL_PERIOD_D MCAL_D,
W_MCAL_PERIOD_D MINOR_MCAL_D,
WC_BU_ORG_DH ORG_DH,
(
select max(NVL(W_TASK_D.ROW_WID,0)) as ROW_WID ,COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER,COBS.PATH_ID ,COBS.PROJECT_PERIOD ,COBS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID 
FROM W_TASK_D,
WC_BI_TIMEPHASEDATA_COBS_D COBS,
W_PROJECT_D PROJ_D WHERE 
COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER = PROJ_D.PROJECT_NUMBER  
AND COBS.ORACLE_TASK_NUMBER = W_TASK_D.TASK_NUMBER
AND PROJ_D.INTEGRATION_ID = W_TASK_D.PROJECT_ID 
AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_TASK_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID 
AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID(+) = 13
group by COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER,COBS.PATH_ID ,COBS.PROJECT_PERIOD ,COBS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID)COBS,
(
select max(NVL(BUD_WID.ROW_WID,0)) as ROW_WID ,BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID ,BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER ,BUD_WID.TASK_ID
from WC_BI_TIMEPHASEDATA_BDG_HDR_D BUD_WID 
group by BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID ,BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER ,BUD_WID.TASK_ID)BUD_WID
--,WC_BI_COMPLIANCE_COMPLIANT_A COMP_AGG
WHERE 
FS.PROJECT_NUMBER  = PROJ_D.PROJECT_NUMBER (+) 
AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID(+) = 13
AND TO_CHAR(TO_date(concat(FS.PROJECT_PERIOD,'-01'),'YYYY-MM-DD'),'MON-YY')= TO_CHAR(MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT (+) -10,'MON-YY')
AND MCAL_D.MCAL_CAL_WID (+)  = 1012 AND UPPER(MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_TYPE (+) ) = 'MONTH'
AND TO_CHAR(TO_date(concat(FS.MINOR_PERIOD,'-01'),'YYYY-MM-DD'),'MON-YY')= TO_CHAR(MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_END_DT (+) -10,'MON-YY')  
AND MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_CAL_WID (+)  = 1012 AND UPPER(MINOR_MCAL_D.MCAL_PERIOD_TYPE (+) ) = 'MONTH'
AND PROJ_D.X_CONTROL_PU = ORG_DH.INTEGRATION_ID  (+)
AND PROJ_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = ORG_DH.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID (+)
AND (NVL(FS.CHANGE_HEADER_ID,FS.BUDGET_HEADER_ID) = (substr(BUD_WID.PROJECt_NUMBER(+),1,6)||'.'||BUD_WID.TASK_ID(+))  )
AND FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = BUD_WID.PROJECT_NUMBER  (+)
AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = BUD_WID.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID  (+)
AND FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = COBS.PROJECT_NUMBER (+) 
AND FS.PATH_ID = COBS.PATH_ID (+) 
AND FS.PROJECT_PERIOD = COBS.PROJECT_PERIOD (+) 
AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = COBS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID (+)
--AND FS.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID = COMP_AGG.WORKFLOW_INSTANCE_ID 
--AND FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = COMP_AGG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
--and FS.PROJECT_NUMBER = COMP_AGG.PROJECT_NUMBER

select  /*+ PARALLEL(WC_PBCS_BUDGET_ACTUALS_FS,9,DEFAULT) */
distinct FS.PERIOD, 
FS.LEGAL_ENTITY, 
FS.PERFORMANCE_UNIT,
FS.CURRENCY,
FS.ACCOUNT,
FS.AUDITTRAIL,
FS.PLAN AS PLAN,
FS.ACTUALS as ACTUALS,
0 AS BUDGET_BILL_HRS ,
0 As ACTUALS_BILL_HRS ,

NVL(MP.ROW_WID, 0) AS GL_PERIOD_WID,
NVL(AC.ROW_WID, 0) AS GL_ACCOUNT_WID,
NVL(BU.ROW_WID, 0) AS PU_WID,
NVL(EX.ROW_WID, 0) AS PLAN_FX_RATE_WID,
'N' AS PER_HOUR_METRIC_FLG
FROM
(select * from WC_PBCS_BUDGET_ACTUALS_FS
pivot (sum(amount) for scenario in ( 'Plan' as PLAN , 'Actual' as ACTUALS)
))FS,
W_MCAL_PERIOD_D MP,
WC_ACCOUNT_DH AC,
WC_BU_ORG_DH BU,
WC_PBCS_PLAN_EX_RATE_D EX

WHERE FS.PERIOD = MP.MCAL_PERIOD_NAME(+)

AND FS.ACCOUNT = AC.ACCOUNT_NUM(+)

AND FS.PERFORMANCE_UNIT = BU.PU(+)

AND SUBSTR(FS.CURRENCY, 1, 3) = EX.CURRENCY(+)
AND EX.FX_RATE_TYPE(+) = 'FX Rates - Average'
AND FS.PERIOD = EX.PERIOD(+)

UNION

Select * from (
WITH 
BILL AS (
select * from (select  PERIOD, LEGAL_ENTITY, PERFORMANCE_UNIT, CURRENCY, FST.ACCOUNT, AUDITTRAIL,SCENARIO, AMOUNT 
from WC_PBCS_BUDGET_ACTUALS_BH_FS CROSS JOIN (select distinct account FROM  WC_PBCS_BUDGET_ACTUALS_PH_FS) FST ) 
PIVOT (SUM(AMOUNT) FOR SCENARIO IN ( 'Plan' AS PLAN , 'Actual' AS ACTUALS ))
)  ,
FS AS (
select * from (select  PERIOD, LEGAL_ENTITY, PERFORMANCE_UNIT, CURRENCY, ACCOUNT, AUDITTRAIL,SCENARIO, AMOUNT from WC_PBCS_BUDGET_ACTUALS_PH_FS) PIVOT (SUM(AMOUNT) FOR SCENARIO IN ( 'Plan' AS PLAN , 'Actual' AS ACTUALS ))
) 
select /*+ PARALLEL(WC_PBCS_BUDGET_ACTUALS_PH_FS, 9,DEFAULT)  PARALLEL(WC_PBCS_BUDGET_ACTUALS_BH_FS,9,DEFAULT)*/
 NVL(BILL.PERIOD,FS.PERIOD) PERIOD, 
NVL(BILL.LEGAL_ENTITY,FS.LEGAL_ENTITY) LEGAL_ENTITY, 
NVL(BILL.PERFORMANCE_UNIT,FS.PERFORMANCE_UNIT) PERFORMANCE_UNIT,
NVL(BILL.CURRENCY,FS.CURRENCY) CURRENCY,
NVL(BILL.ACCOUNT,FS.ACCOUNT) ACCOUNT,
NVL(BILL.AUDITTRAIL,FS.AUDITTRAIL) AUDITTRAIL,
NVL(FS.PLAN,0)  AS PLAN,
NVL(FS.ACTUALS,0)  AS ACTUALS,
NVL(BILL.PLAN,0) AS BUDGET_BILL_HRS ,
NVL(BILL.ACTUALS,0) AS ACTUALS_BILL_HRS ,
NVL(MP.ROW_WID, 0) AS GL_PERIOD_WID,
NVL(AC.ROW_WID, 0) AS GL_ACCOUNT_WID,
NVL(BU.ROW_WID, 0) AS PU_WID,
NVL(EX.ROW_WID, 0) AS PLAN_FX_RATE_WID,
'Y' AS PER_HOUR_METRIC_FLG
from BILL FULL OUTER JOIN FS
ON  FS.PERFORMANCE_UNIT=BILL.PERFORMANCE_UNIT AND FS.ACCOUNT=BILL.ACCOUNT 
AND FS.AUDITTRAIL=BILL.AUDITTRAIL AND FS.PERIOD=BILL.PERIOD AND FS.CURRENCY=BILL.CURRENCY
AND FS.LEGAL_ENTITY=BILL.LEGAL_ENTITY 
LEFT JOIN WC_ACCOUNT_DH AC ON  AC.ACCOUNT_NUM=NVL(BILL.ACCOUNT, FS.ACCOUNT)
LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_BU_ORG_DH BU ON BU.PU=NVL(BILL.PERFORMANCE_UNIT, FS.PERFORMANCE_UNIT)
LEFT JOIN WC_PBCS_PLAN_EX_RATE_D EX on EX.CURRENCY=NVL(SUBSTR(BILL.CURRENCY, 1, 3) ,SUBSTR(FS.CURRENCY, 1, 3) ) 
AND EX.FX_RATE_TYPE = 'FX Rates - Average'
AND EX.PERIOD=NVL(BILL.PERIOD,Fs.PERIOD) 
 LEFT JOIN W_MCAL_PERIOD_D MP ON  MP.MCAL_PERIOD_NAME=NVL(BILL.PERIOD,FS.PERIOD) 
 WHERE 1=1)

(select max(to_char(trunc(sysdate),'yyyymmdd')) as dates from w_etl_run_s)
union
(select distinct to_char(to_date(M_END_CAL_DT_WID,'yyyymmdd'),'yyyymmdd')  as dates 
from w_day_d where calendar_date between add_months(to_date(to_char(trunc(sysdate),'yyyymmdd'),'yyyymmdd'),-11) 
and add_months(to_date(to_char(trunc(sysdate),'yyyymmdd'),'yyyymmdd'),-1))

  FROM 
  (select ppf.person_id
      ,max(decode(fif.application_column_name,'SEGMENT1',apr1.full_name,''))  Primary_Approver
      ,max(decode(fif.application_column_name,'SEGMENT2',apr2.full_name,''))  Secondary_Approver
        from 
            apps.per_people_x ppf
    ,apps.per_people_x apr1
    ,apps.per_people_x apr2
    ,apps.per_person_analyses ppa
    ,apps.per_analysis_criteria pac
    ,apps.fnd_id_flex_segments fif
    ,apps.fnd_id_flex_structures ffs
where 1=1
  and ppf.person_id = ppa.person_id
  and ppa.analysis_criteria_id = pac.analysis_criteria_id
  and pac.id_flex_num = fif.id_flex_num
  and pac.id_flex_num = ffs.id_flex_num
  and ffs.id_flex_structure_code = 'JEG Timesheet Approvers'
  and pac.segment1 = apr1.person_id (+)
  and pac.segment2 = apr2.person_id (+)
group by ppf.person_id)Pa
,(select ppa.person_id
     , pac.segment4 as Technologist_Solution_Area
     , pac.segment3 as TS_Currently_in_Program
     , pac.enabled_flag as TS_enabled_flag
     , ppa.date_from as TS_START_DATE
     , ppa.date_to as TS_END_DATE
	 ,ppa.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS TS_PPA_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
     ,pac.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS TS_PAC_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
from  PER_PERSON_ANALYSES ppa
    , PER_ANALYSIS_CRITERIA pac
    , apps.fnd_id_flex_structures_tl fifs 
where 1=1
and   ppa.analysis_criteria_id = pac.analysis_criteria_id
and   ppa.ID_FLEX_NUM = fifs.ID_FLEX_NUM
and   fifs.id_flex_structure_name = 'Technologist Solutions'
and   fifs.language = 'US'
and   trunc(sysdate) between nvl(ppa.date_from, trunc(sysdate))  and nvl(ppa.date_to, trunc(sysdate)))TS
  ,per_all_people_f p
     , per_person_type_usages_f pptu
     , per_person_types ppt
     , po_agents buy
     , per_periods_of_service svc
     , fnd_lookup_values lrlkp
     , per_all_vacancies pav
     , (SELECT   res.source_id AS person_id
               , MAX (sr.last_update_date) aux1_changed_on_dt
            FROM ra_salesreps_all sr
               , jtf_rs_resource_extns res
           WHERE sr.resource_id = res.resource_id
                 AND res.CATEGORY = 'EMPLOYEE'
        GROUP BY res.source_id) sr
     , (SELECT a.person_id
             , a.employee_category
             , a.assignment_id
             , a.effective_start_date
             , a.effective_end_date
             , a.position_id
             , a.supervisor_id
             , a.business_group_id
             , a.organization_id
             , a.location_id
             , a.period_of_service_id
             , a.assignment_status_type_id
             , a.assignment_type
             , a.creation_date
             , a.last_update_date
             , a.manager_flag  -- Newly Included
             , RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY assignment_id ORDER BY DECODE
                                                           (a.assignment_type
                                                          , 'E', 1
                                                          , 'C', 2
                                                          , 3
                                                           )
              , a.primary_flag DESC
              , a.effective_start_date DESC
              , a.assignment_id DESC) cnt
              , a.people_group_id 
              , a.vacancy_id
              , a.ASS_ATTRIBUTE2
          FROM per_all_assignments_f a
             , per_assignment_status_types t
         WHERE a.assignment_type IN ('E', 'C', 'A')
           AND a.primary_flag = 'Y'
           AND a.assignment_status_type_id = t.assignment_status_type_id
       ) a
     , (SELECT lookup_code
             , meaning
          FROM hr_standard_lookups
         WHERE lookup_type = 'NATIONALITY') l
     , (SELECT lookup_code
             , meaning
          FROM hr_standard_lookups
         WHERE lookup_type = 'EMPLOYEE_CATG') lc

    ,  (SELECT meaning,pp.parent_id,pp.phone_number
          FROM fnd_lookup_values,per_phones pp
         WHERE lookup_type(+) = 'PHONE_TYPE'
          AND lookup_code(+) = pp.phone_type
           AND language = userenv ('lang')
           AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
        ) pt --Added newly changed by RAR
    ,  (select person_id, MAX(date_from) aux3_changed_on_dt, MAX(last_update_date) last_update_date
          from per_addresses
        WHERE person_id is not  null
        group by person_id) py
,        (select person_id, MAX(last_update_date) aux4_changed_on_dt
          from PER_PEOPLE_EXTRA_INFO
        WHERE person_id is not  null
                  AND INFORMATION_TYPE IN  ('JEG_HR_DIVESTITURE_NEW','JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID','US_ETHNIC_ORIGIN','JEG_HR_EXTERNAL_SUPERVISOR'  ) 
        group by person_id) ppei,
(SELECT ppei.person_id, PEI_information4
FROM per_people_extra_info ppei , 
(select person_id, max(object_version_number) object_version_number
FROM per_people_extra_info 
WHERE information_type IN 'JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID'
and pei_information4 is not null
group by person_id) upnmax
WHERE information_type IN 'JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID'
and pei_information4 is not null
and ppei.person_id=upnmax.person_id and ppei.object_version_number=upnmax.object_version_number) upn,
( SELECT person_id,PEI_INFORMATION3 
FROM per_people_extra_info
WHERE information_type IN 'JEG_HR_SYSTEM_ID' ) TALEO
,(SELECT   papf.person_id
      , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3 as EXT_SUP_EMP_NUM
      , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION4 as EXT_SUP_EMP_NAME
      , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION10 as EXT_SUP_TERM_DT
      , ppei.PEI_INFORMATION6 as EXT_SUP_EMAIL
      ,Case 
        WHEN SUBSTR(ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3, 1, 2) = 'CH' Then 'Legacy CH2M Oracle HR'
        WHEN SUBSTR(ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3, 1, 2) = 'AT' Then 'ATEN PeopleSoft'
        WHEN SUBSTR(ppei.PEI_INFORMATION3, 1, 2) = 'JE' Then 'Jacobs Oracle HR'
        Else Null 
        END as EXT_SUP_SOURCE_SYSTEM
FROM    PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F papf
        LEFT OUTER JOIN HR.PER_PEOPLE_EXTRA_INFO ppei ON 
                        papf.PERSON_ID = ppei.PERSON_ID 
                    AND ppei.INFORMATION_TYPE LIKE 'JEG_HR_EXTERNAL_SUPERVISOR%'
WHERE 1=1
AND   TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN papf.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND papf.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE) EXT        
,PAY_PEOPLE_GROUPS PPG
,(SELECT
    pma.person_id AS person_id,
    ppf.full_name AS full_name,
    pma.CONSULTATION_TYPE  AS CONSULTATION_TYPE ,
    hl1.meaning AS CONSULTATION_TYPE_DESC,
    pma.CONSULTATION_DATE AS CONSULTATION_DATE,
    pma.attribute1 AS EYE_CARE,
    pma.CONSULTATION_RESULT  AS CONSULTATION_RESULT,
    hl2.meaning AS CONSULTATION_RESULT_DESC,
    pma.NEXT_CONSULTATION_DATE AS NEXT_CONSULTATION_DATE,
	pma.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE
FROM
    per_medical_assessments pma,
    per_all_people_f ppf,
    FND_COMMON_lookups hl1,
    FND_COMMON_lookups hl2
WHERE
    pma.person_id = ppf.person_id
    AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN ppf.effective_start_date AND ppf.effective_end_date

    AND pma.CONSULTATION_RESULT = hl2.lookup_code(+)

    and pma.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY='PL Assessment Details' ) EN
,( select next_consultation_date

    and   lookup_code = pma.attribute5) as Tropical_Eligible_Country         -- new data item
from PER_MEDICAL_ASSESSMENTS pma
where attribute_category = 'PL Assessment Details'
and attribute5 is not null and attribute4 is not null ) TE

AND a.people_group_id = ppg.people_group_id(+)

  distinct
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_num,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.creation_date_dl,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.created_by_dl,
  decode(JEG_MV_COST_PA.transfer_status_code,    'B',    'G',    JEG_MV_COST_PA.transfer_status_code) transfer_status_code,
  DECODE(JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function,'ST',SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.quantity)) AS HOURS,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.program_update_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.pa_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal as gl_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal as recvr_gl_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.reversed_flag,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.task_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.denom_currency_code,
  0 as denom_raw_cost,
  (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'  THEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.denom_burdened_cost ELSE (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_cr,0)) END) END) as denom_burdened_cost,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_currency_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_rate_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_rate_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_exchange_rate,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.work_type_id,
  apps.jeg_get_gl_period(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal,JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id) recvr_gl_period_name,
  apps.jeg_get_pa_period(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal,JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id)  recvr_pa_period_name,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_rate_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_rate_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_currency_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_item_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_organization_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.job_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function,
  NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
JEG_MV_COST_PA.NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
  NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.INCURRED_BY_HR_ID,0) as INCURRED_BY_HR_ID,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.incurred_by_organization_id,
  0 as entered_by,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.vendor_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.period_set_name,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.period_set_name,
  NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID,
  null resource_organization_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.non_labor_resource,
  (CASE
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC') THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST') THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'INV' THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND
    JEG_MV_COST_PA.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y' THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND
    JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND NVL(null,0) NOT IN (1,2) THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG =  'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') =  'Y' THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
     ELSE ' '
   END) resource_class, 
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.wip_resource_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_type,
  
  0 AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  
  CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN  SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount) ELSE ((CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJFUNC_COST_EXCHANGE_RATE,1)) END AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  
  0 AS PROJECT_RAW_COST,
  
  CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN
  SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_burdened_cost, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_burdened_cost)) ELSE ((CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_EXCHANGE_RATE,1)) END AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST,
  
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.raw_cost_rate,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost_rate,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_job_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.transaction_source,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE,
  '0' AS X_CUSTOM,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,
  0 as denom_raw_cost,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cost_burden_distributed_flag,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_hold_flag,
  (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.dr_code_combination_id||JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_line_num = MIN(JEG_MV_COST_PA.dr_code_combination_id||JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_line_num) OVER( PARTITION BY JEG_MV_COST_XLA.source_distribution_id_num_1, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.source_distribution_id_num_1 ORDER BY JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_line_num RANGE UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) THEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost ELSE 0 END) AS BURDEN_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cost_dist_rejection_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_cross_charge_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_ic_processed_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_job_billing_title,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute2,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute5,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_cross_charge_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.JEG_GET_CLASS_FUN,
  NULL AS INVOICE_NUM,
  NULL AS INVOICE_DATE,
  null as po_num,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.non_labor_resource,
  TRIM(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.gl_code_segment3) gl_code_segment3,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_prvdr_organization_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_recvr_organization_id,
  TRIM(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute3) peia_attribute3,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.func_currency_code as func_currency_code,
CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN (sign(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr, 0) - nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr, 0))  * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.ACCT_BURDENED_COST)) ELSE (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0)) END) END AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  0 AS FUNC_RAW_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.customer_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_line_num,
  'LABOR_COST' as source_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_header_id,
  (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS WORKSHARE_FLAG,
0 AS PRDR_DENOM_RAW_COST,
  (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_DENOM_BURDENED_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_FUNC_RAW_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_PROJ_RAW_COST,
  (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(apps.jeg_get_corporate_rate(JEG_MV_COST_PA.acct_currency_code,JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_currency_code,JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal),0) AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(apps.jeg_get_corporate_rate(JEG_MV_COST_PA.acct_currency_code,JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_currency_code,JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal),0) AS PRDR_PROJ_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.ACCT_CURRENCY_CODE ELSE NULL END) AS PRDR_ACCT_CURR_CODE,
   non_billable_code1 -- Classfication code P
  ,non_billable_code2 -- Classfication code R
  ,non_billable_code3 -- Classfication code W
  ,non_billable_code4 -- Classfication code C
  ,non_billable_code5 -- Classfication code X
  ,apps.jeg_pa_nonb_hours(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,apps.jeg_nonbillable_code('01'),SIGN((NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0))),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag) AS NB1_Hours  -- Classfication Hours P
  ,apps.jeg_pa_nonb_hours(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,apps.jeg_nonbillable_code('02'),SIGN((NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0))),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag) AS NB2_Hours  -- Classfication Hours R
  ,apps.jeg_pa_nonb_hours(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,apps.jeg_nonbillable_code('03'),SIGN((NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0))),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag) AS NB3_Hours  -- Classfication Hours W
  ,apps.jeg_pa_nonb_hours(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,apps.jeg_nonbillable_code('04'),SIGN((NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0))),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag) AS NB4_Hours  -- Classfication Hours C
  ,apps.jeg_pa_nonb_hours(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,apps.jeg_nonbillable_code('05'),SIGN((NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0))),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag) AS NB5_Hours  -- Classfication Hours X
  
  ,CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION' 
  OR JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%'
  OR JEG_MV_COST_PA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE LIKE 'Conv-%'
  OR JEG_MV_COST_PA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%' THEN 'CONVERSION' ELSE NULL END AS X_CONVERSION_NAME
,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID AS X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID
,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE
,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_CORRECTION_DATE AS X_CORRECTION_DATE 
,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE AS X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE
,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE AS X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE

FROM JEG_MV_COST_PA JEG_MV_COST_PA,
     JEG_MV_COST_XLA JEG_MV_COST_XLA
where JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID = JEG_MV_COST_XLA.source_distribution_id_num_1
  AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_num = JEG_MV_COST_XLA.source_distribution_id_num_2
  and JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_type=JEG_MV_COST_XLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE
  AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.APPLICATION_ID=275--Today
  AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_class_code IN ('COST','PROVIDER_COST','RECEIVER_COST')--today
  AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function in('PJ','ST')--Today VI,USG
and JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_type='D'

-- LABOR DATA 'R' RAW LINES
SELECT
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.creation_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.created_by,
  decode(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code,'B','G', pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code) transfer_status_code,
  0 as quantity,
pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.billable_flag,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.program_update_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_date,
  --(CASE WHEN pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type = 'C' THEN   pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.cr_code_combination_id  ELSE   pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.dr_code_combination_id END) dr_code_combination_id,
  dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id,
  --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_gl_date,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.gl_date) recvr_gl_date,
  xal.accounting_date as gl_date,
  xal.accounting_date as recvr_gl_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.reversed_flag,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_id,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.task_id,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_currency_code,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS'  THEN pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_raw_cost ELSE (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) END) as denom_raw_cost,
  0 AS DENOM_BURDENED_COST,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_currency_code,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_type,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_exchange_rate,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.work_type_id,
  --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_gl_period_name,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.gl_period_name) recvr_gl_period_name,
  --xah.period_name,
  jeg_get_gl_period (nvl(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_gl_period_name,
  --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_pa_period_name,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_period_name) recvr_pa_period_name,
  jeg_get_pa_period (nvl(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id)  recvr_pa_period_name,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_type,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_currency_code,
  peia.expenditure_item_date,
  peia.expenditure_type,
  nvl(peia.override_to_organization_id, pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id) expenditure_organization_id,
  peia.job_id,
  peia.system_linkage_function,
  --  peia.inventory_item_id,
  NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
  --  DECODE(peia.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, NULL,PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE,peia.UNIT_OF_MEASURE)  unit_of_measure,
  (CASE  WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'ST' THEN 'HOURS'
  WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' THEN 'USAGE HOURS'
  WHEN PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE = 'MILEAGE' THEN 'MILEAGE'
 WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'VI' THEN 'DOLLARS'
  ELSE PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE
  END) NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
  --pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id,
  NVL(incurred_by.attribute9,0) as INCURRED_BY_HR_ID,
  pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id,
  --pa_expenditures_all.entered_by_person_id,
  --entered_by.attribute9 as ENTERED_BY_HR_ID
  0 as entered_by,
  pa_expenditures_all.vendor_id,
  pa_implementations_all.period_set_name,
  gl_ledgers.period_set_name,
  --  pa_project_assignments.project_role_id,
  NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID,
  null resource_organization_id,
  peia.non_labor_resource,
  (CASE
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC') THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST') THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'INV' THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND NVL(LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND
    PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y' THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND
    peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
   WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE =  2 THEN 'PEOPLE'
   WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE =  1 THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND NVL(BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE,0) NOT IN (1,2) THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG =  'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND NVL(PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') =  'Y' THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
     ELSE ' '
   END) resource_class, 
  peia.wip_resource_id,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type,
  CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount) ELSE ((CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.PROJFUNC_COST_EXCHANGE_RATE,1)) END AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  --(CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.PROJFUNC_COST_EXCHANGE_RATE,1) AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  0 AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN
  SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(NVL(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_raw_cost, peia.project_raw_cost)) ELSE ((CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.PROJECT_EXCHANGE_RATE,1)) END AS PROJECT_RAW_COST,
  --(CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.PROJECT_EXCHANGE_RATE,1) AS PROJECT_RAW_COST,
  --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.PROJECT_BURDENED_COST,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.DENOM_BURDENED_COST)  project_burdened_cost,
  0 AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST,
  peia.raw_cost_rate,
  peia.burden_cost_rate,
  peia.bill_job_id,
  peia.transaction_source,
  PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE,
  '0' AS X_CUSTOM,
  peia.attribute8,
  (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) as denom_raw_cost,
  peia.cost_burden_distributed_flag,
  peia.bill_hold_flag,
  0 AS BURDEN_COST,
  peia.cost_dist_rejection_code,
  peia.cc_cross_charge_code,
  peia.cc_ic_processed_code,
  peia.bill_job_billing_title,
  peia.attribute2,
  peia.attribute5,
  peia.cc_cross_charge_type,
  JEG_GET_CLASS (pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID, 'Controlling Performance Unit','C'),
  --api.invoice_num,
  NULL AS INVOICE_NUM,
  --api.invoice_date,
  NULL AS INVOICE_DATE,
  --poh.segment1 as po_num,
  NULL as po_num,
  peia.non_labor_resource,
  TRIM(dr_gl_code_combinations.segment3),
  peia.cc_prvdr_organization_id,
  peia.cc_recvr_organization_id,
  TRIM(peia.attribute3),
gl_ledgers.currency_code as func_currency_code,
  0 AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) AS FUNC_RAW_COST,
  pa_tasks.customer_id,
  xal.ae_line_num,
  'LABOR_COST' as source_type,
  xal.ae_header_id,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS WORKSHARE_FLAG,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_DENOM_RAW_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_DENOM_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_FUNC_RAW_COST,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJ_RAW_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_PROJ_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.ACCT_CURRENCY_CODE ELSE NULL END) AS PRDR_ACCT_CURR_CODE,
  NULL AS non_billable_code1 -- Classfication code P
  ,NULL AS non_billable_code2 -- Classfication code R
  ,NULL AS non_billable_code3 -- Classfication code W
  ,NULL AS non_billable_code4 -- Classfication code C
  ,NULL AS non_billable_code5 -- Classfication code X
  ,0 AS NB1_Hours  -- Classfication Hours P
  ,0 AS NB2_Hours  -- Classfication Hours R
  ,0 AS NB3_Hours  -- Classfication Hours W
  ,0 AS NB4_Hours  -- Classfication Hours C
  ,0 AS NB5_Hours  -- Classfication Hours X
   ,CASE WHEN FND_USER.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION' 
  OR PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%'
  OR PEIA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE LIKE 'Conv-%'
  OR PEIA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%' THEN 'CONVERSION' ELSE NULL END AS X_CONVERSION_NAME
  ,PAAF.ASS_ATTRIBUTE3 AS X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID
  ,peia.ORIG_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE AS X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE
  ,CASE
      WHEN INSTR ( peia.attribute8, 'JMC LC') > 1
         THEN NEXT_DAY (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_Date - 1, 'FRIDAY')
      END as X_CORRECTION_DATE 
,case when xah.gl_transfer_status_code ='Y' THEN xah.gl_transfer_Date  END AS X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE
,pa_expenditures_all.EXPENDITURE_ENDING_DATE as X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE
FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all ,
  pa_expenditure_items_all peia,
pa_expenditures_all ,
  pa_implementations_all ,
  gl_ledgers ,
  apps.pa_lookups ,
  pa_projects_all ,
  PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL ,
  PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES ,
  -- PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS,
  PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES ,
  BOM_RESOURCES ,
  PO_LINES_ALL   POL,
  PO_LINE_TYPES_B   LT,
  -- gl_code_combinations cr_gl_code_combinations,
  gl_code_combinations  dr_gl_code_combinations,
  --ap_invoice_distributions_all apid,
  --po_distributions_all pd,
  --po_headers_all poh,
  --ap_invoices_all api,
  per_all_people_f  incurred_by,
  --per_all_people_f entered_by
  pa_tasks ,
  xla_distribution_links  xdl,
  xla_ae_headers  xah,
  xla_ae_lines  xal,
  FND_USER 
  ,PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F  PAAF
WHERE 


1=1
AND

peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE = PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.EXPENDITURE_TYPE
AND FND_USER.USER_ID(+) = peia.CREATED_BY
  AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id = peia.expenditure_item_id
  AND peia.expenditure_id = pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_id
  --AND (select decode(peia.transaction_source,'IC Elimination',c.cr_code_combination_id, c.dr_code_combination_id) from PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL c
  --where expenditure_item_id = peia.expenditure_item_id and line_type = DECODE(peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION,'VI','R', 'PJ','R', DECODE(peia.expenditure_type,'India Elimination','R',DECODE(INSTR(peia.expenditure_type,'ICWHREI'),1,'R','D'))) and reversed_flag is null and line_num_reversed is null) = dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id
  AND pa_projects_all.project_id = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_id
  AND pa_lookups.lookup_code (+)= pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type
  AND pa_lookups.lookup_type (+)= 'COST DISTRIBUTION LINE TYPE'
  AND pa_implementations_all.org_id = pa_projects_all.org_id
  AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE
  AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.ORG_ID = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID
  --AND peia.assignment_id = PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.assignment_id (+)
  AND peia.non_labor_resource = PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.non_labor_resource (+)
  AND peia.wip_resource_id = BOM_RESOURCES.resource_id (+)
  AND peia.PO_LINE_ID  = POL.PO_LINE_ID     (+)     -- PC:  do these join by a different criteria? 
  AND POL.LINE_TYPE_ID = LT.LINE_TYPE_ID (+)
  --AND TO_NUMBER(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.system_reference2) = apid.invoice_id(+)
  --AND TO_NUMBER(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.system_reference3) = apid.distribution_line_number(+)
  --AND APID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID = PD.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID(+)
  --AND PD.PO_HEADER_ID = POH.PO_HEADER_ID(+)
  --AND APID.INVOICE_ID = API.INVOICE_ID(+)
  AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type = 'R' -- Raw Cost
   AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = PAAF.person_id (+)
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= trunc(PAAF.effective_end_date (+))
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= trunc(PAAF.effective_start_date (+))
  --(CASE WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' THEN 'R' WHEN (peia.system_linkage_function NOT IN ('VI','USG') and xah.event_type_code IN ('LABOR_COST_DIST','LABOR_COST_DIST_ADJ','xxUSG_COST_DIST')) THEN 'R' ELSE 'D' END)
  --AND peia.TRANSACTION_SOURCE <> 'IC Elimination'  -- REMOVED from R12
  AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = incurred_by.person_id (+)
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= trunc(incurred_by.effective_end_date (+))
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= trunc(incurred_by.effective_start_date (+))
  --AND pa_expenditures_all.entered_by_person_id = entered_by.person_id (+)
  AND peia.task_id = pa_tasks.task_id (+)
AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_1
  AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_2
  AND xal.ae_header_id = xah.ae_header_id -- changed from xdl to xal
  AND xah.gl_transfer_status_code = 'Y'
  AND xah.accounting_entry_status_code = 'F'
  AND xal.ae_header_id = xdl.ae_header_id -- changed reverse the join
    and xdl.application_id=XAL.application_id
  and XAL.application_id=XAH.application_id
  and XAH.application_id=275
  AND xdl.ae_line_num = xal.ae_line_num
  AND xal.accounting_class_code IN ('COST','PROVIDER_COST','RECEIVER_COST')
  AND peia.system_linkage_function not in('VI','USG')
    AND xal.ledger_id = gl_ledgers.ledger_id
  AND gl_ledgers.PERIOD_SET_NAME = 'JEG_STD_CAL' --SS
  AND gl_ledgers.ledger_category_code = 'PRIMARY'
  --AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = 57064
  --AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = xal.code_combination_id --- giving good result
  AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = (SELECT NVL((xal2.code_combination_id),-1) FROM xla_distribution_links xdl2, xla_ae_lines xal2
																					   
  WHERE xdl2.source_distribution_id_num_1 = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id
  AND xdl2.ae_header_id = xal2.ae_header_id
  AND xdl2.ae_line_num = xal2.ae_line_num
								  
											
										
  AND xdl2.source_distribution_type = 'D' AND ROWNUM = 1)
  AND xal.currency_code <> 'STAT'
   AND XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE >= to_date('10/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
 AND (XAH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=  to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')

 )

SELECT
DISTINCT
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_num,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.creation_date_dl,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.created_by_dl,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.transfer_status_code,
  (CASE WHEN  JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_type = 'I' THEN 0 
  ELSE JEG_MV_COST_PA.quantity
  END) quantity,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.program_update_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.pa_date,
  dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id,
  --nvl(JEG_MV_COST_PA.recvr_gl_date,JEG_MV_COST_PA.gl_date) recvr_gl_date,
  
  
  ( SELECT GREATEST(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xah, PCDL2.gl_Date) FROM   pa_cost_distribution_lines_all PCDL2 
  WHERE  PCDL2.expenditure_item_id = JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID
  AND    PCDL2.line_type = 'R'
  AND    ROWNUM = 1
  ) as gl_date, 
  ( SELECT GREATEST(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xah, PCDL2.gl_Date) FROM   pa_cost_distribution_lines_all PCDL2 
  WHERE  PCDL2.expenditure_item_id = JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID
  AND    PCDL2.line_type = 'R'
  AND    ROWNUM = 1
  ) as recvr_gl_date,


  
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.reversed_flag,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.task_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.denom_currency_code,
  (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.raw_cost)) as denom_raw_cost,
  (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost)) AS DENOM_BURDENED_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_currency_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_rate_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_rate_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_exchange_rate,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.work_type_id,
  
  
  jeg_get_gl_period(( SELECT GREATEST(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xah, PCDL2.gl_Date) FROM   pa_cost_distribution_lines_all PCDL2 
  WHERE  PCDL2.expenditure_item_id = JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID
  AND    PCDL2.line_type = 'R'
  AND    ROWNUM = 1
),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id) as gl_period_name,

 jeg_get_pa_period(( SELECT GREATEST(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xah, PCDL2.gl_Date) FROM   pa_cost_distribution_lines_all PCDL2 
  WHERE  PCDL2.expenditure_item_id = JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID
  AND    PCDL2.line_type = 'R'
  AND    ROWNUM = 1
  ),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id) as pa_period_name,
  
  
  --nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.period_name, JEG_MV_COST_PA.gl_period_name) as gl_period_name,
  --nvl(JEG_MV_COST_PA.recvr_pa_period_name,JEG_MV_COST_PA.pa_period_name) recvr_pa_period_name,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_rate_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_rate_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_currency_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_item_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_organization_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.job_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function,
  NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
  INCURRED_BY_HR_ID as JEG_MV_COST_PA_HR_ID,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.incurred_by_organization_id,
  0 as entered_by,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.vendor_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.period_set_name,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.period_set_name,
  NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID,
  null resource_organization_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.non_labor_resource,
  (CASE
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC') THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST') THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'INV' THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' 
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' 
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND 
    JEG_MV_COST_PA.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y' THEN 'PEOPLE' 
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND 
    JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND NVL(null,0) NOT IN (1,2) THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG =  'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') =  'Y' THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
     ELSE ' '
   END) resource_class,  
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.wip_resource_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_RAW_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_BURDENED_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.raw_cost_rate,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost_rate,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_job_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.transaction_source,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE, 
  '0' AS X_CUSTOM,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,
  0 as denom_raw_cost,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cost_burden_distributed_flag,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_hold_flag,
  (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost)) AS BURDEN_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cost_dist_rejection_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_cross_charge_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_ic_processed_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_job_billing_title,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute2,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute5,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_cross_charge_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.JEG_GET_CLASS_FUN,
  JEG_MV_PO.invoice_num,
  JEG_MV_PO.invoice_date,
  JEG_MV_PO.po_num,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.non_labor_resource,
   TRIM(dr_gl_code_combinations.segment3) gl_code_segment3,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_prvdr_organization_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_recvr_organization_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute3,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.func_currency_code,
  (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.acct_burdened_cost)) AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.acct_raw_cost)) AS FUNC_RAW_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.customer_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_line_num,
  'NON_LABOR_COST' as source_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_header_id
,null
,null
,null
,null
,null
,null
,null
,null
,null
,null
,CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION' 
  OR JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%'
  OR UPPER(JEG_MV_COST_PA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE) LIKE '%CONVERSION%'
  OR JEG_MV_COST_PA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%' THEN 'CONVERSION' ELSE NULL END AS X_CONVERSION_NAME
  ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID
  ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE
  ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE 
  ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE
FROM 

  JEG_MV_COST_PA1 JEG_MV_COST_PA,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA1 JEG_MV_COST_XLA,
  JEG_MV_PO JEG_MV_PO,
  gl_code_combinations dr_gl_code_combinations
WHERE

  TO_NUMBER(JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_reference2) = JEG_MV_PO.invoice_id
  AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.source_distribution_id_num_1 = JEG_MV_PO.invoice_distribution_id
  AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.document_distribution_id = JEG_MV_PO.invoice_distribution_id
  
  AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'AP_INV_DIST'
  AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_line_code IN (  'AP_FREIGHT_EXPENSE_CM','AP_FREIGHT_EXPENSE_INV','AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_CM','AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_DM','AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_INV','AP_MISC_EXPENSE_CM','AP_MISC_EXPENSE_INV','AP_NON_RECOV_TAX_CM','AP_NON_RECOV_TAX_DM','AP_NON_RECOV_TAX_INV','JEG_US_AP_CM_IC_FRINGE_CR','JEG_US_AP_CM_IC_FRINGE_DR',
'JEG_US_AP_INTERCO_CM_COST_ELIM','JEG_US_AP_INTERCO_CM_REV_ELIM','JEG_US_AP_INTERCO_COST_ELIM','JEG_US_AP_INTERCO_REV_ELIM','JEG_US_AP_INV_IC_FRINGE_CR','JEG_US_AP_INV_IC_FRINGE_DR') 

AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id  = 
  nvl(
   -- First try to get the First R Line from PA
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.PA_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,      
  -- If R line is not available use the AP line from the Invoice
  nvl(JEG_MV_PO.AP_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
  -- If all else fails to back to CDL
  ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.PCDLA_code_combination_id)
  )
    AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.APPLICATION_ID = 200

SELECT  $$HINT1
  0 as expenditure_item_id,
  xal.ae_line_num as line_num,
  xal.creation_date as creation_date,
  xal.created_by as created_by,
  'N/A' as transfer_status_code, 
  0 as quantity,
  'N' as billable_flag,
  ppa.program_update_date as program_update_date,
  xal.accounting_date as pa_date,
  GCC_1.CODE_COMBINATION_ID AS COST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
  xal.accounting_date as gl_date,
  xal.accounting_date as recvr_gl_date,
  'N' as reversed_flag,
  ppa.org_id as org_id,
  ppa.project_id,
  null as task_id,
  xal.currency_code as denom_currency_code,
 (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) as denom_raw_cost,
 (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) as denom_burdened_cost,
  ppa.project_currency_code as project_currency_code,
  ppa.project_rate_date as project_rev_rate_date,
  ppa.project_rate_type as project_rev_rate_type,
  NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate
                    (
                       GL_LEDGERS.currency_code
                      ,PPA.project_currency_code
                      ,XAL.accounting_date
                    ),1) as project_exchange_rate,
  NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate
                    (
                       GL_LEDGERS.currency_code
                      ,PPA.projfunc_currency_code
                      ,XAL.accounting_date
                    ),1) as projfunc_exchange_rate,
  null as work_type_id, 					
  jeg_get_gl_period(xal.accounting_date,ppa.org_id) as recvr_gl_period_name,
  jeg_get_pa_period(xal.accounting_date,ppa.org_id) as recvr_pa_period_name,
  ppa.projfunc_bil_rate_type as projfunc_cost_rate_type,
  xal.accounting_date as projfunc_cost_rate_date,
  ppa.projfunc_currency_code as projfunc_currency_code,  
  null as expenditure_item_date,
  (SELECT aid.expenditure_type||DECODE(PPA.segment1,'44IWSNBL','++'||AID.task_id)
	FROM xla_distribution_links XDL,
		ap_invoice_distributions_all AID
	WHERE xdl.ae_headeR_id = xal.ae_header_id
	AND xdl.ae_line_num = xal.ae_line_num
	AND XDL.source_distribution_type = 'AP_INV_DIST'
	AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 = AID.invoice_distribution_id
	AND XDL.accounting_line_code in ('JEG_US_FRINGE_SPLIT_IC_AP_DR','JEG_US_FRINGE_SPLIT_IC_AP_CR', 'AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_INV')
    AND ROWNUM = 1) as expenditure_type,
  null as expenditure_org_id, 
  null as job_id, 
  'COST_INTERCOMPANY' as system_linkage_function,  
  null as inventory_item_id,
  'N/A' as unit_of_measure, 
  '0' as incurred_by_person_id,
  0 as incurred_by_org_id,
  0 as entered_by_person_id, 
  0 as vendor_id, 
  gl_ledgers.period_set_name as pa_period_set_name,
  gl_ledgers.period_set_name gl_period_set_name,
  null as project_role_id, 
  null as resource_org_id, 
  null as non_labor_resource, 
  null as resource_class,
  0 AS WIP_RESOURCE_ID,
  'COST_INTERCOMPANY' as line_type, 
  (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate
                    (
                       GL_LEDGERS.currency_code
                      ,PPA.projfunc_currency_code
                      ,XAL.accounting_date
                    ),1) AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate
                    (
                       GL_LEDGERS.currency_code
                      ,PPA.projfunc_currency_code
                      ,XAL.accounting_date
                    ),1) AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate
                    (
                       GL_LEDGERS.currency_code
                      ,PPA.project_currency_code
                      ,XAL.accounting_date
                    ),1) AS PROJECT_RAW_COST,  
  (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate
                    (
                       GL_LEDGERS.currency_code
                      ,PPA.project_currency_code
                      ,XAL.accounting_date
                    ),1) AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST,  
  null as raw_cost_rate, 
  null as burden_cost_rate, 
  0 as bill_job_id, 
  'ELIMINATION_COST' as transaction_source, 
  pa_project_types_all.project_type_class_code, 
  '0' as x_custom, 
  null as attribute8,
  (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) as denom_raw_cost, 
  'N' as cost_burden_distributed_flag, 
  'N' as bill_hold_flag, 
  0 as burden_cost,
  null as cost_dist_rejection_code,

FROM gl_ledgers,
  pa_projects_all ppa,
  pa_project_types_all, 
  xla_ae_lines xal,
  xla_ae_headers xah,
  GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS GCC_1
	  

   
																							
																																							  
																																									 
																							   
   

WHERE XAH.AE_HEADER_ID = XAL.AE_HEADER_ID
	AND (GL_LEDGERS.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'PRIMARY')
	AND XAH.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE = 'Y'
	AND XAH.ACCOUNTING_ENTRY_sTATUS_CODE = 'F'
	AND XAL.LEDGER_ID = GL_LEDGERS.LEDGER_ID
	AND XAL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = GCC_1.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
  AND PPA.ORG_ID = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID
  AND ppa.project_type = pa_project_types_all.project_type 
  AND GL_LEDGERS.PERIOD_SET_NAME = 'JEG_STD_CAL'
  AND XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE >= to_date('10/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
	AND EXISTS
		(SELECT 1
		FROM xla_distribution_links XDL,
			ap_invoice_distributions_all AID,
			ap_invoice_lines_all AIL,
			ra_customer_trx_all RCT,
			pa_draft_invoices_all PDI,
			hr_all_organization_units ROU
		WHERE XDL.AE_HEADER_ID = XAH.AE_HEADER_ID
		AND XAL.AE_LINE_NUM = XDL.AE_LINE_NUM
		AND XDL.source_distribution_type = 'AP_INV_DIST'
		AND AID.invoice_id = AIL.invoice_id
		AND AID.invoice_line_number = AIL.line_number
		AND RCT.customer_trx_id = AIL.pa_cc_ar_invoice_id
		AND RCT.trx_number = PDI.ra_invoice_number
		AND RCT.org_id = PDI.org_id
		AND PPA.PROJECT_ID = AID.PROJECT_ID
		AND XDL.source_distribution_type = 'AP_INV_DIST'
		AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 = AID.invoice_distribution_id
		AND XDL.accounting_line_code in ('JEG_US_FRINGE_SPLIT_IC_AP_DR','JEG_US_FRINGE_SPLIT_IC_AP_CR', 'AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_CM', 'AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_INV')
		AND ROU.organization_id = RCT.org_id
		) 
  AND  (PPA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=  to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
  OR  XAH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=  to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
 --AND PPA.SEGMENT1 NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT PROJECT_NUMBER FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL)) --Added for Divestiture logic for ECR
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL) SQ WHERE SQ.PROJECT_NUMBER = PPA.SEGMENT1 )--Added for Divestiture logic.

SELECT 
 peia.expenditure_item_id ,--USG

 pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID,--USG

 pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,--USG

  peia.job_id,
  peia.system_linkage_function,

  (CASE  WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'ST' THEN 'HOURS'
  WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' THEN 'USAGE HOURS'
  WHEN PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE = 'MILEAGE' THEN 'MILEAGE'
  WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'VI' THEN 'DOLLARS'
  ELSE PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE
  END) NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
  NVL(incurred_by.attribute9,0) as INCURRED_BY_HR_ID,
  pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id,
  0 as entered_by,
  pa_expenditures_all.vendor_id,
  pa_implementations_all.period_set_name,
  gl_ledgers.period_set_name,
  NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID,
  null resource_organization_id,
  peia.non_labor_resource,
  (CASE
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC') THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST') THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'INV' THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' 
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND NVL(LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' 
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND 
    PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y' THEN 'PEOPLE' 
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND 
    peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE =  2 THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE =  1 THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND NVL(BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE,0) NOT IN (1,2) THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG =  'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND NVL(PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') =  'Y' THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
     ELSE ' '
   END) resource_class,  
  peia.wip_resource_id,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type,
  ABS(peia.raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,--USG pf_Rawcost
 SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount) AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG pf_burden
  
  ABS(peia.project_raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) AS PROJECT_RAW_COST,--USG p_rawcost

  ,jeg_pa_nonb_hours(peia.attribute8,jeg_nonbillable_code('02'),SIGN((NVL(xal.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))),peia.org_id,PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag) AS NB2_Hours  -- Classfication Hours R
