                      AND dr_gl_code_combinations.SEGMENT2 BETWEEN PACT.ACCOUNT_FROM(+)
                                           AND  PACT.ACCOUNT_TO(+)
                      AND PACT.TYPE(+) IS NOT NULL
                      AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = XAL.code_combination_id

					  		  /*Newly added joins*/
					  AND peia.expenditure_id = pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_id
					  AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = incurred_by.person_id (+)
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= trunc(incurred_by.effective_end_date (+))
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= trunc(incurred_by.effective_start_date (+))
  				  AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = PAAF.person_id (+)
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= trunc(PAAF.effective_end_date (+))
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= trunc(PAAF.effective_start_date (+))
   AND pa_implementations_all.org_id = pa_projects_all.org_id
    AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE 
  AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.ORG_ID = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID
 AND peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE = PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.EXPENDITURE_TYPE 
AND peia.non_labor_resource = PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.non_labor_resource (+)
AND peia.wip_resource_id = BOM_RESOURCES.resource_id (+)
AND peia.PO_LINE_ID  = POL.PO_LINE_ID     (+)      
  AND POL.LINE_TYPE_ID = LT.LINE_TYPE_ID (+)
  AND peia.task_id = pa_tasks.task_id (+)
AND XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE >= to_date('10/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
  AND ( XAH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=  to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
  OR peia.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=  to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
  --AND pa_projects_all.SEGMENT1 NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT PROJECT_NUMBER FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL)) --Added for Divestiture logic for ECR
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL) SQ WHERE SQ.PROJECT_NUMBER = pa_projects_all.SEGMENT1 )--Added for Divestiture logic.*/

SELECT  peia.expenditure_item_id,--USG
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.creation_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.created_by,
  DECODE(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code,'B','G', pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code) transfer_status_code,
  0 AS quantity,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.billable_flag,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.program_update_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_date,
  dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id,
  xal.accounting_date AS gl_date,
  xal.accounting_date AS recvr_gl_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.reversed_flag,
  pa_projects_all.ORG_ID prj_org_id,     --USG
  pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID,            --USG
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.task_id,--USG
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_currency_code,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_raw_cost
    ELSE (
      CASE
        WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0
        THEN xal.entered_dr
        ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0))
      END)
  END) AS denom_raw_cost,
  0    AS DENOM_BURDENED_COST,
  pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,--USG
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_type,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_exchange_rate,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.work_type_id,
  --xah.period_name,
  jeg_get_gl_period(NVL(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_gl_period_name,
  --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_pa_period_name,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_period_name) recvr_pa_period_name,
  jeg_get_pa_period(NVL(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_pa_period_name,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_type,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_date,
  pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,--USG
  peia.expenditure_item_date,
  peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE
  ||jeg_get_iws_rec_project(pa_projects_all.segment1,'L',peia.task_id) expenditure_type,--USG
  NVL(peia.override_to_organization_id, pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id) expenditure_organization_id,
  peia.job_id,
  peia.system_linkage_function,
  NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'ST'
    THEN 'HOURS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG'
    THEN 'USAGE HOURS'
    WHEN PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE = 'MILEAGE'
    THEN 'MILEAGE'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'VI'
    THEN 'DOLLARS'
    ELSE PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE
  END) NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
  NVL(incurred_by.attribute9,0) AS INCURRED_BY_HR_ID,
  pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id,
  0 AS entered_by,
  pa_expenditures_all.vendor_id,
  pa_implementations_all.period_set_name,
  gl_ledgers.period_set_name,
  NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID,
  NULL resource_organization_id,
  peia.non_labor_resource,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC')
    THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST')
    THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'INV'
    THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI'
    AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID       IS NOT NULL
    THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION        = 'VI'
    AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID              IS NULL
    AND NVL(LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE'
    THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION                  = 'VI'
    AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID                        IS NULL
    AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE                      = 'RATE'
    AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y'
    THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION                   = 'VI'
    AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID                         IS NULL
    AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE                       = 'RATE'
    AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N'
    THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP'
    AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE   = 2
    THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP'
    AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE   = 1
    THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function           = 'WIP'
    AND NVL(BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE,0) NOT IN (1,2)
    THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function                  = 'USG'
    AND PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG = 'N'
    THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function                           = 'USG'
    AND NVL(PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') = 'Y'
    THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
    ELSE ' '
  END) resource_class,
  peia.wip_resource_id,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type,
  DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount)           * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) )                                                               AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,     --USG pf_Rawcost
  SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)                                                                      - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount)                                                    AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG pf_burden
  DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) )                                                               AS PROJECT_RAW_COST,      --USG p_rawcost
  SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)                                                                      - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(NVL ( pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_burdened_cost ,peia.project_burdened_cost )) AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST, --USG p_burden
  peia.raw_cost_rate,
  peia.burden_cost_rate,
  peia.bill_job_id,
  peia.transaction_source,
  PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE,
  '0' AS X_CUSTOM,
  peia.attribute8,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0
    THEN xal.entered_dr
    ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0))
  END) AS denom_raw_cost,
  peia.cost_burden_distributed_flag,
  peia.bill_hold_flag,
  0 AS BURDEN_COST,
  peia.cost_dist_rejection_code,
  peia.cc_cross_charge_code,
  peia.cc_ic_processed_code,
  peia.bill_job_billing_title,
  peia.attribute2,
  peia.attribute5,
  peia.cc_cross_charge_type,
  JEG_GET_CLASS(pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID, 'Controlling Performance Unit','C'),
  NULL AS INVOICE_NUM,
  NULL AS INVOICE_DATE,
  NULL AS po_num,
  peia.non_labor_resource,
  TRIM(dr_gl_code_combinations.segment3),
  peia.cc_prvdr_organization_id,
  peia.cc_recvr_organization_id,
  TRIM(peia.attribute3),
  gl_ledgers.currency_code                                                                            AS func_currency_code,--USG
  (NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)                                              - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0))  AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG f_burden
  DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0) ) AS FUNC_RAW_COST,     --USG f_Rawcost
  pa_tasks.customer_id,
  xal.ae_line_num,
  'LABOR_COST' AS source_type,
  xal.ae_header_id,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN 'Y'
    ELSE 'N'
  END) AS WORKSHARE_FLAG,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN (
      CASE
        WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0
        THEN xal.entered_dr
        ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0))
      END)
    ELSE 0
  END) AS PRDR_DENOM_RAW_COST,
  0    AS PRDR_DENOM_BURDENED_COST,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN (
      CASE
        WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0
        THEN xal.accounted_dr
        ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))
      END)
    ELSE 0
  END) AS PRDR_FUNC_RAW_COST,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN (
      CASE
        WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0
        THEN xal.accounted_dr
        ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))
      END)
    ELSE 0
  END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN (
      CASE
        WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0
        THEN xal.accounted_dr
        ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))
      END)
    ELSE 0
  END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJ_RAW_COST,
  0                                                                                                                                                 AS PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  0                                                                                                                                                 AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  0                                                                                                                                                 AS PRDR_PROJ_BURDENED_COST,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.ACCT_CURRENCY_CODE
    ELSE NULL
  END) AS PRDR_ACCT_CURR_CODE ,
  NULL AS non_billable_code1 -- Classfication code P
  ,
  NULL AS non_billable_code2 -- Classfication code R
  ,
  NULL AS non_billable_code3 -- Classfication code W
  ,
  NULL AS non_billable_code4 -- Classfication code C
  ,
  NULL AS non_billable_code5 -- Classfication code X
  ,
  0 AS NB1_Hours -- Classfication Hours P
  ,
  0 AS NB2_Hours -- Classfication Hours R
  ,
  0 AS NB3_Hours -- Classfication Hours W
  ,
  0 AS NB4_Hours -- Classfication Hours C
  ,
  0 AS NB5_Hours -- Classfication Hours X
  ,
  CASE
    WHEN FND_USER.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION'
    OR PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%'
    OR PEIA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE LIKE 'Conv-%'
    OR PEIA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%'
    THEN 'CONVERSION'
    ELSE NULL
  END                             AS X_CONVERSION_NAME ,
  PAAF.ASS_ATTRIBUTE3             AS X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID ,
  PEIA.ORIG_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE AS X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE ,
  CASE
    WHEN INSTR ( peia.attribute8, 'JMC LC') > 1
    THEN NEXT_DAY (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_Date - 1, 'FRIDAY')
  END AS X_CORRECTION_DATE ,
  CASE
    WHEN xah.gl_transfer_status_code ='Y'
    THEN xah.gl_transfer_Date
  END                                         AS X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE ,
  pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_ending_date AS X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE
FROM xla_distribution_links XDL ,
  xla_ae_lines XAL ,
  xla_ae_headers XAH ,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all pa_cost_distribution_lines_all ,
  pa_expenditure_items_all peia ,
  pa_projects_all pa_projects_all ,
  gl_ledgers gl_ledgers ,
  gl_code_combinations dr_gl_code_combinations
  --,JEG_PA_AUTO_ACCT_LKP_SET_V PALKP
  ,
  JEG_PA_ACCT_CATEGORIES PACT
  /*Newly added tables*/
  ,
  pa_expenditures_all ,
  per_all_people_f incurred_by ,
  pa_implementations_all ,
  PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL ,
  PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES ,
  PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES ,
  BOM_RESOURCES ,
  PO_LINES_ALL POL ,
  PO_LINE_TYPES_B LT ,
  pa_tasks ,
  FND_USER ,
  PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F PAAF
WHERE XAH.event_type_code            IN ('USG_COST_DIST','USG_COST_DIST_ADJ')
AND NVL(peia.transaction_source,'x') != 'FA_DEPREN'
  --added newly for usg transactions
AND XAH.ae_header_id IN
  (SELECT  GT.ae_header_id
  FROM xla_ae_headers GT
  WHERE gt.event_type_code  IN ('USG_COST_DIST','USG_COST_DIST_ADJ') and 
  exists
    (SELECT  1
    FROM xla_ae_headers XAH ,
      xla_distribution_links XDL ,
      pa_expenditure_items_all PEI
    WHERE XAH.ae_header_id          = GT.ae_header_id
    and XAH.application_id          = GT.application_id --added by Palani
        and XDL.application_id          = XAH.application_id --added by Palani
    AND XAH.event_type_code        IN ('USG_COST_DIST','USG_COST_DIST_ADJ')
    AND XDL.ae_header_id            = XAH.ae_header_id
    AND PEI.expenditure_item_id     = XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1
    AND PEI.system_linkage_function = 'USG'
    AND EXISTS
      (SELECT 1
      FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all CDL
      WHERE CDL.expenditure_item_id = PEI.expenditure_item_id
      AND CDL.line_type             = 'D'
      )
    AND EXISTS
      (SELECT 1
      FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all CDL
      WHERE CDL.expenditure_item_id = PEI.expenditure_item_id
      AND CDL.line_type             = 'R'
      )
    )
  )
AND XAH.ae_header_id    = XDL.ae_headeR_id
AND FND_USER.USER_ID(+) = peia.CREATED_BY
AND XDL.ae_headeR_id    = XAL.ae_header_id
AND XDL.ae_line_num     = XAL.ae_line_num
AND XDL.application_id            = XAH.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24
AND XAH.ae_header_id    = XAL.ae_headeR_id   -- Added by Palani 05/03/24
AND XAH.application_id            = XDL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24
AND XAH.application_id            = XAL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24
AND XDL.application_id            = XAL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24
  --AND TRUNC(XAL.CREATION_DATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(l_last_completion_Date)
  --                                 AND  TRUNC(SYSDATE)
  --AND peia.org_id = p_org_id
AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1                   = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id
AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_2                   = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num
AND (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type          = 'R'
AND peia.system_linkage_function                       = 'USG')
AND XAL.accounting_class_code                          = 'COST'
AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id = peia.expenditure_item_id
AND peia.project_id                                    = pa_projects_all.project_id
--AND XAL.ledger_id                                      = gl_ledgers.ledger_id -- commented by Palani 05/03/24
  AND XAH.ledger_id                                      = gl_ledgers.ledger_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24
  --AND   XAL.code_combination_id = dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id
  --AND 'EType||SType Sup Inv Rev DIR' =
  --       PALKP.segment_Value_lookup_set_name(+)
  --AND peia.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_ID =
  --       PALKP.expenditure_item_id(+)
AND gl_ledgers.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'PRIMARY'
AND dr_gl_code_combinations.SEGMENT2 BETWEEN PACT.ACCOUNT_FROM(+) AND PACT.ACCOUNT_TO(+)
AND PACT.TYPE(+)                               IS NOT NULL
AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id =
  (SELECT NVL ( (CDL2.dr_code_combination_id) ,-1 --pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.dr_code_combination_id
    )
  FROM pa_cost_Distribution_lines_all CDL2
  WHERE CDL2.expenditure_item_id = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id
  AND CDL2.line_type             = 'D'
  AND ROWNUM                     = 1
  )
  /*Newly added joins*/
AND peia.expenditure_id                       = pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_id
AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = incurred_by.person_id (+)
AND pa_expenditures_all.creation_date        <= incurred_by.effective_end_date (+)
AND pa_expenditures_all.creation_date        >= incurred_by.effective_start_date (+)
AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = PAAF.person_id (+)
AND TRUNC(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= TRUNC(PAAF.effective_end_date (+))
AND TRUNC(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= TRUNC(PAAF.effective_start_date (+))
AND pa_implementations_all.org_id             = pa_projects_all.org_id
AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE              = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE
AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.ORG_ID                    = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID
AND peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE                     = PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.EXPENDITURE_TYPE
AND peia.non_labor_resource                   = PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.non_labor_resource (+)
AND peia.wip_resource_id                      = BOM_RESOURCES.resource_id (+)
AND peia.PO_LINE_ID                           = POL.PO_LINE_ID (+)
AND POL.LINE_TYPE_ID                          = LT.LINE_TYPE_ID (+)
AND peia.task_id                              = pa_tasks.task_id (+)
AND XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE                      >= to_date('10/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
AND ( XAH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE                   >= to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
OR peia.LAST_UPDATE_DATE                     >= to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
--AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL) SQ WHERE SQ.PROJECT_NUMBER = pa_projects_all.SEGMENT1 )--Added for Divestiture logic.
UNION ALL
--R Flow 2nd union EBS
SELECT peia.expenditure_item_id,--USG
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.creation_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.created_by,
  DECODE(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code,'B','G', pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code) transfer_status_code,
  0 AS quantity,

  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.reversed_flag,

  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.task_id,--USG
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_currency_code,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_raw_cost
    ELSE (
      CASE
        WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0
        THEN xal.entered_dr
        ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0))
      END)
  END) AS denom_raw_cost,
  0    AS DENOM_BURDENED_COST,

  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_type,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_exchange_rate,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.work_type_id,
  --xah.period_name,
  jeg_get_gl_period(NVL(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_gl_period_name,
  --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_pa_period_name,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_period_name) recvr_pa_period_name,
  jeg_get_pa_period(NVL(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_pa_period_name,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_type,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_date,
  peia.projfunc_currency_code,--USG
  peia.expenditure_item_date,
  peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE
  ||jeg_get_iws_rec_project(pa_projects_all.segment1,'L',peia.task_id) expenditure_type,--USG
  NVL(peia.override_to_organization_id, pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id) expenditure_organization_id,
  peia.job_id,
  peia.system_linkage_function,
  NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'ST'
    THEN 'HOURS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG'
    THEN 'USAGE HOURS'
    WHEN PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE = 'MILEAGE'
    THEN 'MILEAGE'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'VI'
    THEN 'DOLLARS'
    ELSE PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE
  END) NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
  NVL(incurred_by.attribute9,0) AS INCURRED_BY_HR_ID,
  pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id,
  0 AS entered_by,
  pa_expenditures_all.vendor_id,
  pa_implementations_all.period_set_name,
  gl_ledgers.period_set_name,
  NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID,
  NULL resource_organization_id,
  peia.non_labor_resource,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC')
    THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST')
    THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'INV'
    THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI'
    AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID       IS NOT NULL
    THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION        = 'VI'
    AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID              IS NULL
    AND NVL(LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE'
    THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION                  = 'VI'
    AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID                        IS NULL
    AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE                      = 'RATE'
    AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y'
    THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION                   = 'VI'
    AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID                         IS NULL
    AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE                       = 'RATE'
    AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N'
    THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP'
    AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE   = 2
    THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP'
    AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE   = 1
    THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function           = 'WIP'
    AND NVL(BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE,0) NOT IN (1,2)
    THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function                  = 'USG'
    AND PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG = 'N'
    THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function                           = 'USG'
    AND NVL(PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') = 'Y'
    THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
    ELSE ' '
  END) resource_class,
  peia.wip_resource_id,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type,
  DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount)           * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) ) * -1                                                               AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,     --USG pf_Rawcost
  SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)                                                                      - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount) * -1                                                    AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG pf_burden
  DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) ) * -1                                                               AS PROJECT_RAW_COST,      --USG p_rawcost
  SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)                                                                      - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(NVL ( pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_burdened_cost ,peia.project_burdened_cost )) * -1 AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST, --USG p_burden
  peia.raw_cost_rate,
  peia.burden_cost_rate,
  peia.bill_job_id,
  peia.transaction_source,
  PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE,
  '0' AS X_CUSTOM,
  peia.attribute8,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0
    THEN xal.entered_dr
    ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0))
  END) AS denom_raw_cost,
  peia.cost_burden_distributed_flag,
  peia.bill_hold_flag,
  0 AS BURDEN_COST,
  peia.cost_dist_rejection_code,
  peia.cc_cross_charge_code,
  peia.cc_ic_processed_code,
  peia.bill_job_billing_title,
  peia.attribute2,
  peia.attribute5,
  peia.cc_cross_charge_type,
  JEG_GET_CLASS(pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID, 'Controlling Performance Unit','C'),
  NULL AS INVOICE_NUM,
  NULL AS INVOICE_DATE,
  NULL AS po_num,
  peia.non_labor_resource,
  TRIM(dr_gl_code_combinations.segment3),
  peia.cc_prvdr_organization_id,
  peia.cc_recvr_organization_id,
  TRIM(peia.attribute3),
  gl_ledgers.currency_code                                   AS func_currency_code,--USG
  (NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)                                              - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * -1 AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG f_burden
  DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0) ) *-1 AS FUNC_RAW_COST,     --USG f_Rawcost
  pa_tasks.customer_id,
  xal.ae_line_num,
  'LABOR_COST' AS source_type,
  xal.ae_header_id,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN 'Y'
    ELSE 'N'
  END) AS WORKSHARE_FLAG,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN (
      CASE
        WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0
        THEN xal.entered_dr
        ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0))
      END)
    ELSE 0
  END) AS PRDR_DENOM_RAW_COST,
  0    AS PRDR_DENOM_BURDENED_COST,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN (
      CASE
        WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0
        THEN xal.accounted_dr
        ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))
      END)
    ELSE 0
  END) AS PRDR_FUNC_RAW_COST,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN (
      CASE
        WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0
        THEN xal.accounted_dr
        ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))
      END)
    ELSE 0
  END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN (
      CASE
        WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0
        THEN xal.accounted_dr
        ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))
      END)
    ELSE 0
  END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJ_RAW_COST,
  0                                                                                                                                                 AS PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  0                                                                                                                                                 AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  0                                                                                                                                                 AS PRDR_PROJ_BURDENED_COST,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.ACCT_CURRENCY_CODE
    ELSE NULL
  END) AS PRDR_ACCT_CURR_CODE ,
  NULL AS non_billable_code1 -- Classfication code P
  ,
  NULL AS non_billable_code2 -- Classfication code R
  ,
  NULL AS non_billable_code3 -- Classfication code W
  ,
  NULL AS non_billable_code4 -- Classfication code C
  ,
  NULL AS non_billable_code5 -- Classfication code X
  ,
  0 AS NB1_Hours -- Classfication Hours P
  ,
  0 AS NB2_Hours -- Classfication Hours R
  ,
  0 AS NB3_Hours -- Classfication Hours W
  ,
  0 AS NB4_Hours -- Classfication Hours C
  ,
  0 AS NB5_Hours -- Classfication Hours X
  ,
  CASE
    WHEN FND_USER.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION'
    OR PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%'
    OR PEIA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE LIKE 'Conv-%'
    OR PEIA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%'
    THEN 'CONVERSION'
    ELSE NULL
  END                             AS X_CONVERSION_NAME ,
  PAAF.ASS_ATTRIBUTE3             AS X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID ,
  peia.ORIG_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE AS X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE ,
  CASE
    WHEN INSTR ( peia.attribute8, 'JMC LC') > 1
    THEN NEXT_DAY (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_Date - 1, 'FRIDAY')
  END AS X_CORRECTION_DATE ,
  CASE
    WHEN xah.gl_transfer_status_code ='Y'
    THEN xah.gl_transfer_Date
  END                                         AS X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE ,
  pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_ending_date AS X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE
FROM xla_distribution_links XDL ,
  xla_ae_lines XAL ,
  xla_ae_headers XAH ,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all pa_cost_distribution_lines_all ,
  pa_expenditure_items_all peia ,
  pa_projects_all pa_projects_all ,
  gl_ledgers gl_ledgers ,
  gl_code_combinations dr_gl_code_combinations
  --,JEG_PA_AUTO_ACCT_LKP_SET_V PALKP
  ,
  JEG_PA_ACCT_CATEGORIES PACT
  /*Newly added tables*/
  ,
  pa_expenditures_all ,
  per_all_people_f incurred_by ,
  pa_implementations_all ,
  PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL ,
  PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES ,
  PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES ,
  BOM_RESOURCES ,
  PO_LINES_ALL POL ,
  PO_LINE_TYPES_B LT ,
  pa_tasks ,
  FND_USER ,
  PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F PAAF
WHERE XAH.event_type_code IN ('USG_COST_DIST','USG_COST_DIST_ADJ')
  --added newly for usg transactions
AND XAH.ae_header_id IN
  (SELECT GT.ae_header_id
  FROM xla_ae_headers GT
  WHERE gt.event_type_code        IN ('USG_COST_DIST','USG_COST_DIST_ADJ') and 
  EXISTS
    (SELECT 1
    FROM xla_ae_headers XAH ,
      xla_distribution_links XDL ,
      pa_expenditure_items_all PEI
    WHERE XAH.ae_header_id          = GT.ae_header_id
    and XAH.application_id          = GT.application_id --added by Palani
        and XDL.application_id          = XAH.application_id --added by Palani
    AND XAH.event_type_code        IN ('USG_COST_DIST','USG_COST_DIST_ADJ')
    AND XDL.ae_header_id            = XAH.ae_header_id
    AND PEI.expenditure_item_id     = XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1
    AND PEI.system_linkage_function = 'USG'
    AND EXISTS
      (SELECT 1
      FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all CDL
      WHERE CDL.expenditure_item_id = PEI.expenditure_item_id
      AND CDL.line_type             = 'D'
      )
    AND EXISTS
      (SELECT  1
      FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all CDL
      WHERE CDL.expenditure_item_id = PEI.expenditure_item_id
      AND CDL.line_type             = 'R'
      )
    )
  )
  --  AND peia.transaction_source != 'FA_DEPREN'
AND NVL(peia.transaction_source,'x')                  != 'FA_DEPREN'
AND XAH.ae_header_id                                   = XDL.ae_headeR_id
AND FND_USER.USER_ID(+)                                = peia.CREATED_BY
AND XDL.ae_headeR_id                                   = XAL.ae_header_id
AND XDL.ae_line_num                                    = XAL.ae_line_num
  AND XDL.application_id            = XAH.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24
AND XAH.ae_header_id    = XAL.ae_headeR_id   -- Added by Palani 05/03/24
AND XAH.application_id            = XDL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24
AND XAH.application_id            = XAL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24
AND XDL.application_id            = XAL.application_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24
AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1                   = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id
AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_2                   = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num
AND (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type          = 'R'
AND peia.system_linkage_function                       = 'USG')
AND XAL.accounting_class_code                          = 'COST'
AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id = peia.expenditure_item_id
AND peia.attribute6                                    = pa_projects_all.segment1
 --AND XAL.ledger_id                                      = gl_ledgers.ledger_id -- commented by Palani 05/03/24
  AND XAH.ledger_id                                      = gl_ledgers.ledger_id -- Added by Palani 05/03/24
AND gl_ledgers.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE                    = 'PRIMARY'
AND dr_gl_code_combinations.SEGMENT2 BETWEEN PACT.ACCOUNT_FROM(+) AND PACT.ACCOUNT_TO(+)
AND PACT.TYPE(+)                               IS NOT NULL
AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.cr_code_combination_id
  /*Newly added joins*/
AND peia.expenditure_id                       = pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_id
AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = incurred_by.person_id (+)
AND pa_expenditures_all.creation_date        <= incurred_by.effective_end_date (+)
AND pa_expenditures_all.creation_date        >= incurred_by.effective_start_date (+)
AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = PAAF.person_id (+)
AND TRUNC(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= TRUNC(PAAF.effective_end_date (+))
AND TRUNC(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= TRUNC(PAAF.effective_start_date (+))
AND pa_implementations_all.org_id             = pa_projects_all.org_id
AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE              = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE
AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.ORG_ID                    = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID
AND peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE                     = PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.EXPENDITURE_TYPE
AND peia.non_labor_resource                   = PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.non_labor_resource (+)
AND peia.wip_resource_id                      = BOM_RESOURCES.resource_id (+)
AND peia.PO_LINE_ID                           = POL.PO_LINE_ID (+)
AND POL.LINE_TYPE_ID                          = LT.LINE_TYPE_ID (+)
AND peia.task_id                              = pa_tasks.task_id (+)
AND XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE                      >= to_date('10/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
AND ( XAH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE                   >= to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
OR peia.LAST_UPDATE_DATE                     >= to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
  --AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL) SQ ----WHERE SQ.PROJECT_NUMBER = pa_projects_all.SEGMENT1 )--Added for Divestiture logic.

  FACT_STAGE.X_UNBURDENED_RATE ,
  FACT_STAGE.X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_SUPERVISOR_LOC_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_SUPERVISOR_JOB_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_REVIEW_TYPE,
  FACT_STAGE.X_GRADE_ID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_PAY_BASIS_ID,
  FACT_STAGE.TRANS_TYPE,
  FACT_STAGE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,
  FACT_STAGE.EVENT_TYPE_RSN_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_GRE_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_NEW_HIRE_DT,
  NULL as X_ACTIVE_FLG_UPD,
  NULL as X_NEW_HIRE_FLG_UPD,
  NULL as X_TERMINATED_FLG_UPD,
  NULL as COUNT_UPD,
  NULL as X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT,
  FACT_STAGE.X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_MANAGEMENT_INCENTIVE,
  nvl(to_number(to_char(fact_stage.X_CHANGE_DATE,'yyyymmdd')), 0)-lag(nvl(to_number(to_char(fact_stage.X_CHANGE_DATE,'yyyymmdd')), 0),1,0)over(order by FACT_STAGE.person_id,FACT_STAGE.snapshot_date,FACT_STAGE.EMPLOYEE_WID) as CHANGE_AMOUNT,
  FACT_STAGE.X_TERM_COMMENTS,
  FACT_STAGE.X_PERFORMANCE_TYPE,
  FACT_STAGE.X_REVIEW_DATE,
  FACT_STAGE.RATING,
  FACT_STAGE.CURR_JOB_ID ,
  case when FACT_STAGE.PREV_JOB_ID is null then lag(FACT_STAGE.CURR_JOB_ID,1) over (order by FACT_STAGE.person_id,FACT_STAGE.snapshot_date,FACT_STAGE.EMPLOYEE_WID) else FACT_STAGE.PREV_JOB_ID end PREV_JOB_ID ,
  FACT_STAGE.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,
  FACT_STAGE.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE ,
  FACT_STAGE.X_EMP_HIRE_DT,
  FACT_STAGE.EMP_X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT,
  FACT_STAGE.X_FA_BU_ORG_WID,
  FACT_STAGE.X_ECR_FLAG,
  FACT_STAGE.CURR_GRADE_ID,
  CASE WHEN FACT_STAGE.PREV_GRADE_ID is null then lag(FACT_STAGE.CURR_GRADE_ID,1) over (order by FACT_STAGE.person_id, FACT_STAGE.snapshot_date,FACT_STAGE.EMPLOYEE_WID) else FACT_STAGE.PREV_GRADE_ID end PREV_GRADE_ID,
  FACT_STAGE.PAY_BASIS_WID
  ,FACT_STAGE.X_UPLIFT_FLAG
  ,FACT_STAGE.X_GLOBAL1_XRATE
  ,FACT_STAGE.X_GLOBAL2_XRATE
  ,FACT_STAGE.X_FTE_SALARY_ANNL
  ,FACT_STAGE.X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO
  ,CASE WHEN X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO=0 THEN 'No Data' 
   WHEN FACT_STAGE.SALARY_ANNL < FACT_STAGE.PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT THEN 'Below MIN'
  WHEN FACT_STAGE.SALARY_ANNL > FACT_STAGE.PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT THEN 'Above MAX'
  when X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO <0.9 then 'MIN - 0.9'
  when X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO >1.1 then '1.1 - MAX' else '0.9 - 1.1' end as X_FTE_Compa_Ratio_Zone
 FROM 
(SELECT 
qn1.ASSIGNMENT_ID, --Active Flow
  qn1.SNAPSHOT_DATE,
  qn1.PERSON_ID,
  qn1.DATE_OF_BIRTH,
  qn1.INTEGRATION_ID,
  qn1.W_INSERT_DT,
  qn1.W_UPDATE_DT,
  qn1.X_ACTIVE_FLG,
  qn1.X_NEW_HIRE_FLG,
  qn1.X_TERMINATED_FLG,
  qn1.EMPLOYMENT_WID,
  qn1.LOCATION_WID,
  qn1.HR_ORG_WID,
  qn1.EMPLOYEE_WID,
  qn1.HR_BUSINESS_UNIT_WID,
  qn1.JOB_WID,
  qn1.PAY_GRADE_WID,
  qn1.SUPERVISOR_WID ,
  qn1.POW_START_DT ,
  qn1.GRD_ENTRY_DT ,
  qn1.ORG_ENTRY_DT ,
  qn1.JOB_ENTRY_DT ,
  qn1.LAST_SAL_INCR_DT ,
  qn1.FTE ,
  qn1.GLOBAL1_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  qn1.LOC_CURR_CODE ,
  qn1.LOC_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  qn1.SUPERVISOR_IND, 
  qn1.NRMLSD_PERF_RATING ,
  qn1.SALARY_ANNL ,
  qn1.SALARY_MONTH ,
  qn1.SALARY_HOUR ,
  qn1.X_ACTUAL_SALARY ,
  qn1.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_ANNL ,
  qn1.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_HOUR ,
  qn1.X_NEXT_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  qn1.X_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  qn1.PPP_ATTRIBUTE3,
  qn1.EMP_POSTN_DH_WID,
  qn1.MANAGER_ROLE_IND,  
  qn1.X_CHANGE_AMOUNT,
  qn1.X_CHANGE_DATE,
  qn1.X_SALARY_CHANGE_REASON,
  qn1.X_NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE ,
  qn1.X_CURR_EMPLOYEE_WID,
  qn1.X_UNBURDENED_RATE ,
  qn1.X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_WID,
  qn1.X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_WID,
  qn1.X_SUPERVISOR_LOC_WID,
  qn1.X_SUPERVISOR_JOB_WID,
  qn1.X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_WID,
  qn1.X_REVIEW_TYPE,
  qn1.X_GRADE_ID,
  qn1.X_PAY_BASIS_ID,
  qn1.TRANS_TYPE,
  qn1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,
  qn1.EVENT_TYPE_RSN_WID,
  qn1.X_GRE_WID,
  qn1.X_NEW_HIRE_DT,
  qn1.X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  qn1.X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  qn1.X_MANAGEMENT_INCENTIVE,
  qn1.X_TERM_COMMENTS,
  qn1.X_PERFORMANCE_TYPE,
  qn1.X_REVIEW_DATE,
  qn1.RATING,
  qn1.CURR_JOB_ID,
  qn1.PREV_JOB_ID ,
  qn1.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,
  qn1.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,
  qn1.X_EMP_HIRE_DT,
  qn1.EMP_X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT,
  qn1.X_FA_BU_ORG_WID,
  qn1.X_ECR_FLAG,
  qn1.CURR_GRADE_ID,
  qn1.PREV_GRADE_ID,
  qn1.PAY_BASIS_WID
  ,qn1.X_UPLIFT_FLAG
  ,qn1.X_GLOBAL1_XRATE
  ,qn1.X_GLOBAL2_XRATE
,qn1.X_FTE_SALARY_ANNL
,qn1.X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO
,qn1.PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT
,qn1.PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT 
FROM 
(SELECT  /*+ ORDERED USE_NL(emp_postn)  parallel(24)*/
FS.ASSIGNMENT_ID, --Active Flow
  FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE,
  FS.PERSON_ID,
  FS.DATE_OF_BIRTH,
  FS.INTEGRATION_ID,
  FS.W_INSERT_DT,
  FS.W_UPDATE_DT,
  FS.X_ACTIVE_FLG as X_ACTIVE_FLG,
  FS.X_NEW_HIRE_FLG as X_NEW_HIRE_FLG,
  FS.X_TERMINATED_FLG as X_TERMINATED_FLG,
  CASE
    WHEN EMPL.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE EMPL.ROW_WID
  END EMPLOYMENT_WID,
  LOC.ROW_WID as LOCATION_WID,
  ORG.ORG_WID AS HR_ORG_WID,
  CASE
  WHEN EMP.ROW_WID IS NULL
  THEN 0
  ELSE EMP.ROW_WID
  END EMPLOYEE_WID,
  CASE
    WHEN BUS.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE BUS.ROW_WID
  END as HR_BUSINESS_UNIT_WID,
  JOB.ROW_WID as JOB_WID,
  CASE
    WHEN GRD.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE GRD.ROW_WID
  END PAY_GRADE_WID,
  SUP.ROW_WID AS SUPERVISOR_WID ,
  FS.ADJUSTED_SVC_DATE as POW_START_DT ,
  FS.GRD_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.ORG_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.JOB_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.PPP_LAST_CHANGE_DATE as LAST_SAL_INCR_DT ,
  FS.FTE ,
  FS.GLOBAL1_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  FS.LOC_CURR_CODE ,
  FS.LOC_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  CASE
    WHEN SUP_IND.SUPERVISOR_ID IS NOT NULL
    THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END as SUPERVISOR_IND, 
  FS.DFLT_RATING_PCT as NRMLSD_PERF_RATING ,
  FS.SALARY_ANNL ,
  FS.SALARY_MONTH ,
  FS.SALARY_HOUR ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_ANNL ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_HOUR ,
  FS.NEXT_PERF_REVIEW_DATE as X_NEXT_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  FS.REVIEW_DATE as X_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  FS.PPP_ATTRIBUTE3,
  CASE
	WHEN EMP_POSTN.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE EMP_POSTN.ROW_WID
  END as EMP_POSTN_DH_WID,
  CASE 
   WHEN FS.MANAGER_FLAG = 'Y' 
   THEN 1
   ELSE 0
  END as MANAGER_ROLE_IND,  
  FS.X_CHANGE_AMOUNT,
  FS.PPP_CHANGE_DATE as X_CHANGE_DATE,
  FS.X_SALARY_CHANGE_REASON,
  FS.NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE as X_NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE ,
  CASE
	WHEN CURR_EMP.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE CURR_EMP.ROW_WID
  END as X_CURR_EMPLOYEE_WID,
  FS.PPP_ATTRIBUTE4 as X_UNBURDENED_RATE ,
  HRA.ROW_WID as X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_WID,
  SUP_ORG.ROW_WID    AS X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_WID,
  SUP_LOCATION.ROW_WID AS X_SUPERVISOR_LOC_WID,
  SUP_JOB.ROW_WID      AS X_SUPERVISOR_JOB_WID,
  SUP_BUS.ROW_WID    AS X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_WID,
  FS.X_REVIEW_TYPE,
  FS.X_GRADE_ID,
  FS.X_PAY_BASIS_ID,
  FS.TRANS_TYPE,
  FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,
  CASE
	WHEN EVT_RSN_TYP.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE EVT_RSN_TYP.ROW_WID
  END as EVENT_TYPE_RSN_WID,
  CASE
	WHEN GRE.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE GRE.ROW_WID
  END X_GRE_WID,
  FS.X_NEW_HIRE_DT,
  WORK_LOC.ROW_WID AS X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  SUP_WORK_LOCATION.ROW_WID AS X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  FS.X_MANAGEMENT_INCENTIVE,
  FS.X_TERM_COMMENTS,
  FS.X_PERFORMANCE_TYPE,
  FS.X_REVIEW_DATE,
  FS.RATING,
  FS.JOB_ID as CURR_JOB_ID,
  FS.PREV_JOB_ID ,
  FS.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,
  FS.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,
  EMP.EMP_HIRE_DT AS X_EMP_HIRE_DT,
  EMP.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT AS EMP_X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT,
  BU_ORG.ROW_WID AS X_FA_BU_ORG_WID,
  FS.X_ECR_FLAG,
  FS.GRADE_ID as CURR_GRADE_ID,
  FS.PREV_GRADE_ID,
  NVL(PB.ROW_WID,0) PAY_BASIS_WID
  ,FS.X_UPLIFT_FLAG
  ,NVL((SELECT  EXCH_RATE
            FROM      PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r
                    , PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_GLOBAL_CURR_G g
            WHERE     r.TO_CURCY_CD = g.GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE
            AND       r.RATE_TYPE = g.GLOBAL1_RATE_TYPE
            AND       r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = g.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
            AND       r.FROM_CURCY_CD = fs.LOC_CURR_CODE
            AND       EXISTS (SELECT 1 
                              FROM  PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r1
                        WHERE r1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
                        AND   r1.RATE_TYPE = r.RATE_TYPE
                        AND   r1.TO_CURCY_CD  = r.TO_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.FROM_CURCY_CD = r.FROM_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.START_DT <= fs.snapshot_date
                        HAVING MAX(START_DT) = r.START_DT
                        AND    MAX(END_DT) = r.END_DT)), 1) X_GLOBAL1_XRATE
 ,NVL((SELECT  EXCH_RATE
            FROM      PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r
                    , PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_GLOBAL_CURR_G g
            WHERE     r.TO_CURCY_CD = g.GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE
            AND       r.RATE_TYPE = g.GLOBAL2_RATE_TYPE
            AND       r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = g.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
            AND       r.FROM_CURCY_CD = fS.LOC_CURR_CODE
            AND       EXISTS (SELECT 1 
                              FROM  PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r1
                        WHERE r1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
                        AND   r1.RATE_TYPE = r.RATE_TYPE
                        AND   r1.TO_CURCY_CD  = r.TO_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.FROM_CURCY_CD = r.FROM_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.START_DT <= fs.snapshot_date
                        HAVING MAX(START_DT) = r.START_DT
                        AND    MAX(END_DT) = r.END_DT)), 1)  X_GLOBAL2_XRATE  
,CASE WHEN upper(EMPL.REG_TEMP_NAME) like 'FULLTIME%' AND NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 AND NVL(FS.SALARY_ANNL, 0) <> 0 THEN FS.SALARY_ANNL  ELSE
     CASE WHEN NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE FS.SALARY_ANNL / HRA.NORMAL_HOURS *PB.x_standard_hr END 
 END  as X_FTE_SALARY_ANNL 

,CASE WHEN nvl(GRD.PG_MID_YRLY_AMT, 0) = 0 THEN 0
       ELSE CASE WHEN upper(EMPL.REG_TEMP_NAME) like 'FULLTIME%' AND NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 AND NVL(FS.SALARY_ANNL, 0) <> 0 THEN FS.SALARY_ANNL  ELSE
     CASE WHEN NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE FS.SALARY_ANNL / HRA.NORMAL_HOURS *PB.x_standard_hr
     END
END / GRD.PG_MID_YRLY_AMT END as X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO 
	
,nvl(GRD.PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT, 0) AS 	PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT 
,nvl(GRD.PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT, 0) AS 	PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT 
		  
FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS FS

  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYEE_D SUP
  ON FS.SUPERVISOR_ID                =SUP.INTEGRATION_ID
  AND FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = SUP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE <= SUP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  AND SUP.DELETE_FLG = 'N'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D LOC
  ON LOC.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.LOCATION_ID
  AND LOC.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= LOC.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < LOC.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_JOB_D JOB
  ON JOB.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.JOB_ID
  AND JOB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= JOB.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < JOB.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_HR_ASSIGNMENT_D HRA
  ON HRA.INTEGRATION_ID = FS.X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID
  AND HRA.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_DH ORG
  ON ORG.ORGANIZATION_ID              = FS.ORGANIZATION_ID
  AND ORG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND ORG.HIERARCHY_NAME='JEG Org Hierarchy (Functional)'
   AND FS.snapshot_date >= ORG.effective_from_dt
AND FS.snapshot_date < ORG.effective_to_dt

  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D SUP_ORG
  ON SUP_ORG.INTEGRATION_ID          = FS.X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_ID
   AND SUP_ORG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP_ORG.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < SUP_ORG.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D SUP_LOCATION
  ON SUP_LOCATION.INTEGRATION_ID       = FS.X_LOCATION_ID
  AND SUP_LOCATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < SUP_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_JOB_D SUP_JOB
  ON SUP_JOB.INTEGRATION_ID            = FS.X_JOB_ID
  AND SUP_JOB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP_JOB.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < SUP_JOB.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D SUP_BUS
  ON SUP_BUS.INTEGRATION_ID          = FS.X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
  AND SUP_BUS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP_BUS.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < SUP_BUS.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  /* New Inclusions*/
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYEE_D EMP
  ON EMP.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYEE_ID
  AND EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE     >= EMP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE     <= EMP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  AND EMP. DELETE_FLG = 'N'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYMENT_D EMPL
  ON EMPL.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYMENT_ID
  AND EMPL.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID 
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D BUS
  ON BUS.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
  AND BUS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	>= BUS.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	< BUS.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_PAY_GRADE_D GRD
  ON GRD.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.X_PAY_GRADE_ID
  AND GRD.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	>= GRD.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	< GRD.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ROW_WID,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT,EFFECTIVE_TO_DT FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D WHERE CURRENT_FLG='Y') CURR_EMP
  ON CURR_EMP.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYEE_ID
  AND CURR_EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_POSITION_DH EMP_POSTN
  ON EMP_POSTN.BASE_EMP_ID     = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND EMP_POSTN.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	>= EMP_POSTN.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE	< EMP_POSTN.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SNAPSHOT_DATE, SUPERVISOR_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS WHERE X_ACTIVE_FLG=1) SUP_IND
  ON SUP_IND.SUPERVISOR_ID = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND SUP_IND.SNAPSHOT_DATE = FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE
  AND SUP_IND.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_WRKFC_EVENT_TYPE_D EVT_RSN_TYP
  ON EVT_RSN_TYP.EVENT_REASON_CODE = FS.LEAVING_REASON
  AND EVT_RSN_TYP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND EVT_RSN_TYP.EVENT_TYPE_CODE = 'TERM'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ROW_WID,ORG_NUM,ORG_NAME,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,effective_from_dt,effective_to_dt FROM W_INT_ORG_D WHERE TYPE_CODE='GRELEG'
  UNION
  SELECT ROW_WID,ORG_NUM,ORG_NAME,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,effective_from_dt,effective_to_dt FROM W_INT_ORG_D WHERE TYPE_CODE IS NULL) GRE
  ON GRE.INTEGRATION_ID = FS.X_GRE_ID
  AND GRE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.snapshot_date >= GRE.effective_from_dt
AND FS.snapshot_date < GRE.effective_to_dt

  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D WORK_LOC
  ON WORK_LOC.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_ID
  AND WORK_LOC.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= WORK_LOC.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < WORK_LOC.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D SUP_WORK_LOCATION
  ON SUP_WORK_LOCATION.INTEGRATION_ID       = FS.X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_ID
  AND SUP_WORK_LOCATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE >= SUP_WORK_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE  < SUP_WORK_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_BU_ORG_DH BU_ORG
  ON BU_ORG.PU     = FS.PU
  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SNAPSHOT_DATE, PERSON_ID FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS WHERE X_ECR_FLAG = 'Y' and to_char(SNAPSHOT_DATE,'YYYYMM') <= '201902') ECR_IND
  ON ECR_IND.PERSON_ID = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND ECR_IND.SNAPSHOT_DATE = FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_PAY_BASIS_D PB
  ON FS.PAY_BASIS_ID = PB.PAY_BASIS_ID
  AND FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = PB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID


WHERE 
FS.TRANS_TYPE = 'ACTIVE' 

--AND to_char(FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE,'yyyymmdd') IN ('~DATE~')
order by person_id)qn1

UNION ALL

-- Terminated Employees

SELECT qn.ASSIGNMENT_ID, --Termination Flow
  qn.SNAPSHOT_DATE,
  qn.PERSON_ID,
  qn.DATE_OF_BIRTH,

 qn.SUPERVISOR_IND,

 qn.X_CURR_EMPLOYEE_WID,

  ,qn.X_GLOBAL2_XRATE

  FROM

(SELECT /*+ ORDERED USE_NL(emp_postn)  parallel(24)*/
FS.ASSIGNMENT_ID, --Termination Flow
  FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE,
  FS.PERSON_ID,
  FS.DATE_OF_BIRTH,
  FS.INTEGRATION_ID,
  FS.W_INSERT_DT,
  FS.W_UPDATE_DT,
  FS.X_ACTIVE_FLG as X_ACTIVE_FLG,
  FS.X_NEW_HIRE_FLG as X_NEW_HIRE_FLG,
  FS.X_TERMINATED_FLG as X_TERMINATED_FLG,
  CASE
    WHEN EMPL.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE EMPL.ROW_WID
  END EMPLOYMENT_WID,
  LOC.ROW_WID as LOCATION_WID,
  ORG.ORG_WID AS HR_ORG_WID,
  CASE
  WHEN EMP.ROW_WID IS NULL
  THEN 0
  ELSE EMP.ROW_WID
  END EMPLOYEE_WID,
  CASE
    WHEN BUS.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE BUS.ROW_WID
  END as HR_BUSINESS_UNIT_WID,
  JOB.ROW_WID as JOB_WID,
  CASE
    WHEN GRD.ROW_WID IS NULL
    THEN 0
    ELSE GRD.ROW_WID
  END PAY_GRADE_WID,
  SUP.ROW_WID AS SUPERVISOR_WID ,
  FS.ADJUSTED_SVC_DATE as POW_START_DT ,
  FS.GRD_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.ORG_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.JOB_ENTRY_DT ,
  FS.PPP_LAST_CHANGE_DATE as LAST_SAL_INCR_DT ,
  FS.FTE ,
  FS.GLOBAL1_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  FS.LOC_CURR_CODE ,
  FS.LOC_EXCHANGE_RATE ,
  /*CASE
    WHEN SUP_IND.SUPERVISOR_ID IS NOT NULL
    THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END*/ 0 as SUPERVISOR_IND, 
  FS.DFLT_RATING_PCT as NRMLSD_PERF_RATING ,
  FS.SALARY_ANNL ,
  FS.SALARY_MONTH ,
  FS.SALARY_HOUR ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_ANNL ,
  FS.X_ACTUAL_SALARY_HOUR ,
  FS.NEXT_PERF_REVIEW_DATE as X_NEXT_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  FS.REVIEW_DATE as X_PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_DATE ,
  FS.PPP_ATTRIBUTE3,
  CASE
	WHEN EMP_POSTN.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE EMP_POSTN.ROW_WID
  END as EMP_POSTN_DH_WID,
  CASE 
   WHEN FS.MANAGER_FLAG = 'Y' 
   THEN 1
   ELSE 0
  END as MANAGER_ROLE_IND,  
  FS.X_CHANGE_AMOUNT,
  FS.PPP_CHANGE_DATE as X_CHANGE_DATE,
  FS.X_SALARY_CHANGE_REASON,
  FS.NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE as X_NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE ,
  CASE
	WHEN CURR_EMP.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE CURR_EMP.ROW_WID
  END as X_CURR_EMPLOYEE_WID,
  FS.PPP_ATTRIBUTE4 as X_UNBURDENED_RATE ,
  HRA.ROW_WID as X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_WID,
  SUP_ORG.ROW_WID    AS X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_WID,
  SUP_LOCATION.ROW_WID AS X_SUPERVISOR_LOC_WID,
  SUP_JOB.ROW_WID      AS X_SUPERVISOR_JOB_WID,
  SUP_BUS.ROW_WID    AS X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_WID,
  FS.X_REVIEW_TYPE, 
  FS.X_GRADE_ID,
  FS.X_PAY_BASIS_ID,
  FS.TRANS_TYPE,
  FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,
  CASE
	WHEN EVT_RSN_TYP.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE EVT_RSN_TYP.ROW_WID
  END as EVENT_TYPE_RSN_WID,
  CASE
	WHEN GRE.ROW_WID IS NULL
	THEN 0
	ELSE GRE.ROW_WID
  END X_GRE_WID,
  NULL as X_NEW_HIRE_DT,
  WORK_LOC.ROW_WID AS X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  SUP_WORK_LOCATION.ROW_WID AS X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_WID,
  FS.X_MANAGEMENT_INCENTIVE,
  FS.X_TERM_COMMENTS,
  FS.X_PERFORMANCE_TYPE,
  FS.X_REVIEW_DATE,
  FS.RATING,
  FS.JOB_ID as CURR_JOB_ID,
  FS.PREV_JOB_ID as PREV_JOB_ID ,
  FS.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,
  FS.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,
  EMP.EMP_HIRE_DT AS X_EMP_HIRE_DT,
  EMP.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT AS          EMP_X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT,
  BU_ORG.ROW_WID AS X_FA_BU_ORG_WID,
  FS.X_ECR_FLAG,
  FS.GRADE_ID as CURR_GRADE_ID,
  FS.PREV_GRADE_ID,
  NVL(PB.ROW_WID, 0) PAY_BASIS_WID
  ,FS.X_UPLIFT_FLAG
 ,NVL((SELECT  EXCH_RATE
            FROM      PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r
                    , PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_GLOBAL_CURR_G g
            WHERE     r.TO_CURCY_CD = g.GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE
            AND       r.RATE_TYPE = g.GLOBAL1_RATE_TYPE
            AND       r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = g.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
            AND       r.FROM_CURCY_CD = fs.LOC_CURR_CODE
            AND       EXISTS (SELECT 1 
                              FROM  PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r1
                        WHERE r1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
                        AND   r1.RATE_TYPE = r.RATE_TYPE
                        AND   r1.TO_CURCY_CD  = r.TO_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.FROM_CURCY_CD = r.FROM_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.START_DT <= fs.snapshot_date
                        HAVING MAX(START_DT) = r.START_DT
                        AND    MAX(END_DT) = r.END_DT)), 1) X_GLOBAL1_XRATE
 ,NVL((SELECT  EXCH_RATE
            FROM      PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r
                    , PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_GLOBAL_CURR_G g
            WHERE     r.TO_CURCY_CD = g.GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE
            AND       r.RATE_TYPE = g.GLOBAL2_RATE_TYPE
            AND       r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = g.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
            AND       r.FROM_CURCY_CD = fS.LOC_CURR_CODE
            AND       EXISTS (SELECT 1 
                              FROM  PROD_PA_BIDATA32.W_EXCH_RATE_G r1
                        WHERE r1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = r.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
                        AND   r1.RATE_TYPE = r.RATE_TYPE
                        AND   r1.TO_CURCY_CD  = r.TO_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.FROM_CURCY_CD = r.FROM_CURCY_CD
                        AND   r1.START_DT <= fs.snapshot_date
                        HAVING MAX(START_DT) = r.START_DT
                        AND    MAX(END_DT) = r.END_DT)), 1)  X_GLOBAL2_XRATE               
,CASE WHEN upper(EMPL.REG_TEMP_NAME) like 'FULLTIME%' AND NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 AND NVL(FS.SALARY_ANNL, 0) <> 0 THEN FS.SALARY_ANNL  ELSE
     CASE WHEN NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE FS.SALARY_ANNL / HRA.NORMAL_HOURS *PB.x_standard_hr END 
 END  as X_FTE_SALARY_ANNL 
	   
,CASE WHEN nvl(GRD.PG_MID_YRLY_AMT, 0) = 0 THEN 0
       ELSE CASE WHEN upper(EMPL.REG_TEMP_NAME) like 'FULLTIME%' AND NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 AND NVL(FS.SALARY_ANNL, 0) <> 0 THEN FS.SALARY_ANNL  ELSE
     CASE WHEN NVL(HRA.NORMAL_HOURS, 0) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE FS.SALARY_ANNL / HRA.NORMAL_HOURS *PB.x_standard_hr
     END
END / GRD.PG_MID_YRLY_AMT END as X_FTE_COMPA_RATIO 

,nvl(GRD.PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT, 0) AS 	PG_MIN_YRLY_AMT 
,nvl(GRD.PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT, 0) AS 	PG_MAX_YRLY_AMT 		  
FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS FS

  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYEE_D SUP
  ON FS.SUPERVISOR_ID                =SUP.INTEGRATION_ID
  AND SUP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 <= SUP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  AND SUP.DELETE_FLG = 'N'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D LOC
  ON LOC.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.LOCATION_ID
  AND LOC.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= LOC.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < LOC.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_JOB_D JOB
  ON JOB.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.JOB_ID
  AND JOB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= JOB.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < JOB.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_HR_ASSIGNMENT_D HRA
  ON HRA.INTEGRATION_ID = FS.X_HR_ASSIGNMENT_ID
  AND HRA.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_DH ORG
  ON ORG.ORGANIZATION_ID            = FS.ORGANIZATION_ID
  AND ORG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND ORG.HIERARCHY_NAME='JEG Org Hierarchy (Functional)'
     AND FS.snapshot_date >= ORG.effective_from_dt
AND FS.snapshot_date < ORG.effective_to_dt
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D SUP_ORG
  ON SUP_ORG.INTEGRATION_ID          = FS.X_SUP_ORGANIZATION_ID
  AND SUP_ORG.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP_ORG.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < SUP_ORG.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D SUP_LOCATION
  ON SUP_LOCATION.INTEGRATION_ID       = FS.X_LOCATION_ID
   AND SUP_LOCATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < SUP_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_JOB_D SUP_JOB
  ON SUP_JOB.INTEGRATION_ID            = FS.X_JOB_ID
  AND SUP_JOB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP_JOB.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < SUP_JOB.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D SUP_BUS
  ON SUP_BUS.INTEGRATION_ID          = FS.X_SUP_BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
  AND SUP_BUS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP_BUS.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < SUP_BUS.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  /* New Inclusions*/
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYEE_D EMP
  ON EMP.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYEE_ID
  AND EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1     >= EMP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1     <= EMP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  AND EMP.DELETE_FLG = 'N'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_EMPLOYMENT_D EMPL
  ON EMPL.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYMENT_ID
  AND EMPL.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID 
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_INT_ORG_D BUS
  ON BUS.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
  AND BUS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1	>= BUS.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1	< BUS.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_PAY_GRADE_D GRD
  ON GRD.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.X_PAY_GRADE_ID
  AND GRD.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1	>= GRD.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1	< GRD.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ROW_WID,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT,EFFECTIVE_TO_DT FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D WHERE CURRENT_FLG='Y') CURR_EMP
  ON CURR_EMP.INTEGRATION_ID     = FS.EMPLOYEE_ID
  AND CURR_EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_POSITION_DH EMP_POSTN
  ON EMP_POSTN.BASE_EMP_ID     = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND EMP_POSTN.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT	>= EMP_POSTN.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT	< EMP_POSTN.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  /*LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SNAPSHOT_DATE, SUPERVISOR_ID FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS WHERE X_ACTIVE_FLG=1) SUP_IND
  ON SUP_IND.SUPERVISOR_ID = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND SUP_IND.SNAPSHOT_DATE = FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE*/
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_WRKFC_EVENT_TYPE_D EVT_RSN_TYP
  ON EVT_RSN_TYP.EVENT_REASON_CODE = FS.LEAVING_REASON
  AND EVT_RSN_TYP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND EVT_RSN_TYP.EVENT_TYPE_CODE = 'TERM'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ROW_WID,ORG_NUM,ORG_NAME,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,effective_from_dt,effective_to_dt FROM W_INT_ORG_D WHERE TYPE_CODE='GRELEG'
  UNION
  SELECT ROW_WID,ORG_NUM,ORG_NAME,INTEGRATION_ID,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID,effective_from_dt,effective_to_dt FROM W_INT_ORG_D WHERE TYPE_CODE IS NULL) GRE
  ON GRE.INTEGRATION_ID = FS.X_GRE_ID
  AND GRE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.snapshot_date >= GRE.effective_from_dt
AND FS.snapshot_date < GRE.effective_to_dt

  
   LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D WORK_LOC
  ON WORK_LOC.INTEGRATION_ID              = FS.X_EMP_WORK_LOCATION_ID
  AND WORK_LOC.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= WORK_LOC.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < WORK_LOC.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN W_BUSN_LOCATION_D SUP_WORK_LOCATION
  ON SUP_WORK_LOCATION.INTEGRATION_ID       = FS.X_SUP_WORK_LOCATION_ID
  AND SUP_WORK_LOCATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1 >= SUP_WORK_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
  AND FS.X_ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DT+1  < SUP_WORK_LOCATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_BU_ORG_DH BU_ORG
  ON BU_ORG.PU     = FS.PU
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT SNAPSHOT_DATE, PERSON_ID FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_FS WHERE X_ECR_FLAG= 'Y' and to_char(SNAPSHOT_DATE,'YYYYMM') <= '201903') ECR_IND
  ON ECR_IND.PERSON_ID = FS.PERSON_ID
  AND ECR_IND.SNAPSHOT_DATE = FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN WC_PAY_BASIS_D PB
  ON FS.PAY_BASIS_ID = PB.PAY_BASIS_ID
  AND FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = PB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
  

WHERE 
FS.TRANS_TYPE = 'TERMINATION' 
--AND to_char(FS.SNAPSHOT_DATE,'yyyymmdd') IN ('~DATE~')
order by person_id)qn 

) FACT_STAGE
WHERE FACT_STAGE.PERSON_ID <> '2731000'

CASE WHEN EXP_CLASS.XACT_CODE IN ('EXPENDITURE CLASS','Unspecified') THEN 
CASE WHEN EXP_CLASS.XACT_TYPE_CODE  IN ('ST','OT') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ELSE NULL END AS X_LABOR_FLG
,W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_ORIG_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE
,W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE
,W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_CORRECTION_DATE
,W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE							
   FROM W_PROJECT_ROLE_D              ,
  W_MCAL_PERIOD_D PA_PERIOD           ,
  W_MCAL_PERIOD_D GL_PERIOD           ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS                 ,
  W_FINANCIAL_RESOURCE_D              ,

  W_PROJECT_D                         ,
  W_STATUS_D                          ,
  W_WORK_TYPE_D                       ,
  W_XACT_TYPE_D EXP_CLASS             ,
  W_XACT_TYPE_D RESOURCE_CLASS        ,
  W_MCAL_CONTEXT_G PA_CAL             ,
  W_MCAL_CONTEXT_G GL_CAL             ,
  W_CODE_D                            ,
  W_PRODUCT_D                         ,
  W_PARTY_ORG_D                       ,
  W_JOB_D                             ,
  W_JOB_D BILL_JOB                    ,

  W_INT_ORG_D OPERATING_UNIT          ,

  W_INT_ORG_D EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION,
  W_INT_ORG_D RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION   ,
  W_INT_ORG_D INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION,

  W_INT_ORG_D LE2,
  W_EMPLOYEE_D ENTERED_BY_EMP         ,
  W_EMPLOYEE_D INCURRED_BY_EMP        ,
  W_USER_D                            ,
  W_USER_D USER_CREATED               ,

  WC_BU_ORG_DH BU2,
  WC_BU_ORG_DH ASSIGN_PU
  
--  W_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_D CUST,
--  W_PARTY_D PARTY
  WHERE { W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS
INNER JOIN W_PROJECT_D
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJECT_ID    = W_PROJECT_D.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_PROJECT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN PA_CAL
     ON W_PROJECT_D.PROJ_OPERATING_UNIT_ID = PA_CAL.ORG_ID
AND W_PROJECT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID          = PA_CAL.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
AND PA_CAL."CLASS"                           = 'PROJECTS'
LEFT OUTER JOIN GL_CAL
     ON  W_PROJECT_D.LEDGER_ID     = GL_CAL.LEDGER_ID
AND W_PROJECT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = GL_CAL.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
AND GL_CAL."CLASS"                  = 'GL'
LEFT OUTER JOIN PROJ_OPER_UNIT
     ON W_PROJECT_D.PROJ_OPERATING_UNIT_ID = PROJ_OPER_UNIT.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJECT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID          = PROJ_OPER_UNIT.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT   >= PROJ_OPER_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT    < PROJ_OPER_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPERATING_UNIT
     ON W_PROJECT_D.OPERATING_UNIT_ORG_ID = OPERATING_UNIT.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJECT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID         = OPERATING_UNIT.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT  >= OPERATING_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT  < OPERATING_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
LEFT OUTER JOIN EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT_ID = EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID            = EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT            >= EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT             < EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
LEFT OUTER JOIN EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID = EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID               = EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT               >= EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT                < EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION_ID = RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID            = RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT            >= RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT             < RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
LEFT OUTER JOIN INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION_ID = INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID               = INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT               >= INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT                < INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
LEFT OUTER JOIN ENTERED_BY_EMP
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.ENTERED_BY_EMP_ID = ENTERED_BY_EMP.INTEGRATION_ID
AND $$OHR_DSN   = ENTERED_BY_EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT     >= ENTERED_BY_EMP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT      <= ENTERED_BY_EMP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
AND ENTERED_BY_EMP.DELETE_FLG = 'N'
LEFT OUTER JOIN INCURRED_BY_EMP
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.INCURRED_BY_EMP_ID = INCURRED_BY_EMP.INTEGRATION_ID
AND $$OHR_DSN   = INCURRED_BY_EMP.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT      >= INCURRED_BY_EMP.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT       < =INCURRED_BY_EMP.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
AND INCURRED_BY_EMP.DELETE_FLG = 'N'
LEFT OUTER JOIN W_USER_D
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.CHANGED_BY_ID = W_USER_D.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_USER_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= W_USER_D.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT  < W_USER_D.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_CREATED
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.CREATED_BY_ID = USER_CREATED.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = USER_CREATED.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= USER_CREATED.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT  < USER_CREATED.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
LEFT OUTER JOIN BOM
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.MFG_RESOURCE_BOM_ID = BOM.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID       = BOM.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN NL
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.MFG_RESOURCE_NL_ID = NL.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID      = NL.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN W_FINANCIAL_RESOURCE_D
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.FINANCIAL_RESOURCE_ID = W_FINANCIAL_RESOURCE_D.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID         = W_FINANCIAL_RESOURCE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN PA_PERIOD
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJ_ACCOUNTING_PERIOD_ID = PA_PERIOD.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID             = PA_PERIOD.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN GL_PERIOD
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_PERIOD_ID = GL_PERIOD.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID           = GL_PERIOD.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN W_PROJECT_ROLE_D
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJ_ROLE_ID  = W_PROJECT_ROLE_D.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_PROJECT_ROLE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN EXP_CLASS
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.EXPENDITURE_CLASS_ID = EXP_CLASS.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID        = EXP_CLASS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE_CLASS
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.RESOURCE_CLASS_ID = RESOURCE_CLASS.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID     = RESOURCE_CLASS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN W_WORK_TYPE_D
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.WORK_TYPE_ID  = W_WORK_TYPE_D.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_WORK_TYPE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN W_STATUS_D
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.TRANSFER_STATUS_ID = W_STATUS_D.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID      = W_STATUS_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN W_CODE_D
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.UOM           = W_CODE_D.SOURCE_CODE
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_CODE_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
AND W_CODE_D.CATEGORY                     = 'UOM'
AND W_CODE_D.LANGUAGE_CODE                = '$$LANGUAGE_CODE'
LEFT OUTER JOIN W_PRODUCT_D
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PRODUCT_ID    = W_PRODUCT_D.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_PRODUCT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= W_PRODUCT_D.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT  < W_PRODUCT_D.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
LEFT OUTER JOIN W_PARTY_ORG_D
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.VENDOR_ID     = W_PARTY_ORG_D.SUPPLIER_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_PARTY_ORG_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= W_PARTY_ORG_D.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT  < W_PARTY_ORG_D.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
AND W_PARTY_ORG_D.SUPPLIER_ID            IS NOT NULL
LEFT OUTER JOIN W_JOB_D
     ON TRIM(W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_JOB_CODE)        = TRIM(W_JOB_D.JOB_NAME) AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_JOB_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= W_JOB_D.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT  < W_JOB_D.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
LEFT OUTER JOIN BILL_JOB
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.BILL_JOB_ID   = BILL_JOB.INTEGRATION_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = BILL_JOB.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= BILL_JOB.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT  < BILL_JOB.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
 LEFT
OUTER JOIN W_INVENTORY_PRODUCT_D ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = W_INVENTORY_PRODUCT_D.INTEGRATION_ID
 AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = W_INVENTORY_PRODUCT_D.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
 AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= W_INVENTORY_PRODUCT_D.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
 AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < W_INVENTORY_PRODUCT_D.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
 LEFT OUTER JOIN BU1
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_CONTROL_PU = BU1.PU
 LEFT OUTER JOIN BU2
     ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_CHARGED_PU = BU2.PU
LEFT OUTER JOIN ASSIGN_PU
	ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID = ASSIGN_PU.PU
LEFT OUTER JOIN LE1 ON NVL(TO_CHAR(W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_CC_PRVDR_ORGANIZATION_ID),'Unspecified') = LE1.ORG_NUM
	AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = LE1.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN LE2 ON NVL(TO_CHAR(W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_CC_RECVR_ORGANIZATION_ID),'Unspecified') = LE2.ORG_NUM
     AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = LE2.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
--LEFT OUTER JOIN CUST ON W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_TASK_CUSTOMER_ID = CUST.INTEGRATION_ID
--  AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = CUST.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
--  AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= CUST.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
--  AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < CUST.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
--LEFT OUTER JOIN PARTY ON CUST.PARTY_ID = PARTY.INTEGRATION_ID
--  AND PARTY.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = CUST.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID
--  AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT >= PARTY.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT
--  AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT < PARTY.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT
} 
AND W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.X_DUP_RECORDS_FLG IS NULL
GROUP BY 
W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.TASK_ID                                 ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT                              ,
  COALESCE(W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROVIDER_GL_ACCOUNTING_DT,W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.GL_ACCOUNTING_DT)   ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJ_ACCOUNTING_DT                            ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.EXPENDITURE_DT                                ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.RESOURCE_ORGANIZATION_ID                      ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID                   ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.EXPENDITURE_OPER_UNIT_ID                      ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.INCURRED_BY_ORGANIZATION_ID                   ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.COST_GL_ACCOUNT_ID                            ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID                             ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PRODUCT_ID                                    ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.ENTERED_BY_EMP_ID                             ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.INCURRED_BY_EMP_ID                            ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.VENDOR_ID                                     ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_ID                           ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.LINE_NUM                                      ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.REVERSED_FLG                                  ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.BILLABLE_FLG                                  ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.CAPITALIZABLE_FLG                             ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.LINE_TYPE                                     ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.QUANTITY                                      ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DOC_RAW_COST                                  ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DOC_BURDENED_COST                             ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.DOC_CURR_CODE                                 ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.LOC_CURR_CODE                                 ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.PROJ_CURR_CODE                                ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.LOC_EXCH_RATE_TYPE                            ,
  W_PROJ_COST_LINE_FS.LOC_EXCH_RATE_DATE                            ,
